items.title: 界面/clarity: consolidate button primitives (`btn--icon`, `btn--ghost`, `btn--xs`), refine the Knot theme to a black-和-red palette 使用 WCAG 2.1 AA contrast, 添加 配置 icons 为了 Diagnostics/CLI/Secrets/ACP/MCP协议 sections, replace the roundness slider 使用 discrete stops, 和 改进 accessibility 使用 aria-labels across usage filters. (#53272) Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: UI/clarity: consolidate button primitives (`btn--icon`, `btn--ghost`, `btn--xs`), refine the Knot theme to a black-and-red palette with WCAG 2.1 AA contrast, add config icons for Diagnostics/CLI/Secrets/ACP/MCP sections, replace the roundness slider with discrete stops, and improve accessibility with aria-labels across usage filters. (#53272) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: 浏览器/Chrome MCP协议: wait 为了 existing-session 浏览器 tabs to become usable 之后 attach 而不是 treating the initial Chrome MCP协议 handshake as ready, which reduces user-profile timeouts 和 repeated consent churn 在 macOS Chrome attach flows. 修复 #52930. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome MCP: wait for existing-session browser tabs to become usable after attach instead of treating the initial Chrome MCP handshake as ready, which reduces user-profile timeouts and repeated consent churn on macOS Chrome attach flows. Fixes #52930. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 浏览器/CDP: 复用 an already-running loopback 浏览器 之后 a short initial reachability miss 而不是 immediately falling back to relaunch detection, which 修复 second-run 浏览器 start/open regressions 在 slower headless Linux setups. 修复 #53004. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Browser/CDP: reuse an already-running loopback browser after a short initial reachability miss instead of immediately falling back to relaunch detection, which fixes second-run browser start/open regressions on slower headless Linux setups. Fixes #53004. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: CSP/Control 界面: compute SHA-256 hashes 为了 inline `<script>` blocks 在 the served `index.html` 和 include them 在 the `script-src` CSP directive, keeping inline scripts blocked 通过 default while allowing explicitly hashed bootstrap code. (#53307) Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: CSP/Control UI: compute SHA-256 hashes for inline `<script>` blocks in the served `index.html` and include them in the `script-src` CSP directive, keeping inline scripts blocked by default while allowing explicitly hashed bootstrap code. (#53307) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: ClawHub/skills: keep updating already-tracked legacy Unicode slugs 之后 the ASCII-only slug hardening, so older installs do not get stuck behind `Invalid skill slug` errors 期间 `openclaw skills 更新`. (#53206) Thanks @drobison00.
items.rawTitle: ClawHub/skills: keep updating already-tracked legacy Unicode slugs after the ASCII-only slug hardening, so older installs do not get stuck behind `Invalid skill slug` errors during `openclaw skills update`. (#53206) Thanks @drobison00.

items.title: 网关/模型 pricing: 停止 `OpenRouter/auto` pricing refresh 从 recursing indefinitely 期间 bootstrap, so OpenRouter auto routes can populate cached pricing 和 `usage.cost` 重新. 修复 #53035. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/model pricing: stop `openrouter/auto` pricing refresh from recursing indefinitely during bootstrap, so OpenRouter auto routes can populate cached pricing and `usage.cost` again. Fixes #53035. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 插件/内存-lancedb: bootstrap LanceDB 进入 插件 runtime state 在 first use 当 the bundled npm install does not already have it, so `插件.slots.内存="内存-lancedb"` works 重新 之后 global npm installs 不适用 moving LanceDB 进入 OpenClaw core dependencies. 修复 #26100.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/memory-lancedb: bootstrap LanceDB into plugin runtime state on first use when the bundled npm install does not already have it, so `plugins.slots.memory="memory-lancedb"` works again after global npm installs without moving LanceDB into OpenClaw core dependencies. Fixes #26100.

items.title: 插件/bundled runtimes: ship bundled 插件 runtime sidecars like WhatsApp `light-runtime-API.js`, Matrix `runtime-API.js`, 和 other 插件 runtime entry files 在 the npm package 重新, so global installs 停止 failing 在 missing bundled 插件 runtime surfaces.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/bundled runtimes: ship bundled plugin runtime sidecars like WhatsApp `light-runtime-api.js`, Matrix `runtime-api.js`, and other plugin runtime entry files in the npm package again, so global installs stop failing on missing bundled plugin runtime surfaces.

items.title: CLI/channel 认证: auto-select the single configured login-capable channel 为了 `channels login`/`logout`, harden channel ids against prototype-chain 和 control-character abuse, 和 fall back cleanly to catalog-backed channel installs, so channel 认证 works 重新 为了 single-channel setups 和 在-demand channel installs. (#53254) Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: CLI/channel auth: auto-select the single configured login-capable channel for `channels login`/`logout`, harden channel ids against prototype-chain and control-character abuse, and fall back cleanly to catalog-backed channel installs, so channel auth works again for single-channel setups and on-demand channel installs. (#53254) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: Control 界面/认证: 保留 operator scopes through the device-认证 bypass 路径, ignore cached under-scoped operator tokens, 和 show a clear `operator.read` fallback message 当 a connection really lacks read scope, so operator sessions 停止 failing 或 blanking 在 read-backed pages. (#53110) Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/auth: preserve operator scopes through the device-auth bypass path, ignore cached under-scoped operator tokens, and show a clear `operator.read` fallback message when a connection really lacks read scope, so operator sessions stop failing or blanking on read-backed pages. (#53110) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: Commands/认证: 停止 slash-命令 authorization 从 crashing 或 dropping valid allowlists 当 channel `allowFrom` resolution hits unresolved SecretRef-backed accounts, 和 fail closed only 为了 the affected provider inference 路径. (#52791) Thanks @Lukavyi.
items.rawTitle: Commands/auth: stop slash-command authorization from crashing or dropping valid allowlists when channel `allowFrom` resolution hits unresolved SecretRef-backed accounts, and fail closed only for the affected provider inference path. (#52791) Thanks @Lukavyi.

items.title: Agent/failover: classify generic `api_error` payloads as retryable only 当 they include transient failure signals, so MiniMax-style backend failures still trigger 模型 fallback 不适用 misclassifying billing, 认证, 或 format/context errors. (#49611) Thanks @ayushozha.
items.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify generic `api_error` payloads as retryable only when they include transient failure signals, so MiniMax-style backend failures still trigger model fallback without misclassifying billing, auth, or format/context errors. (#49611) Thanks @ayushozha.

items.title: Telegram/threading: populate `currentThreadTs` 在 the threading 工具-context fallback 为了 Telegram DM topics so thread-aware tools still receive the active topic context 当 the main thread metadata is missing. (#52217)
items.rawTitle: Telegram/threading: populate `currentThreadTs` in the threading tool-context fallback for Telegram DM topics so thread-aware tools still receive the active topic context when the main thread metadata is missing. (#52217)

items.title: Docs/飞书: replace `botName` 使用 `name` 在 the channel 配置 examples so the docs match the strict account schema 为了 per-account display names. (#52753) Thanks @haroldfabla2-hue.
items.rawTitle: Docs/Feishu: replace `botName` with `name` in the channel config examples so the docs match the strict account schema for per-account display names. (#52753) Thanks @haroldfabla2-hue.

items.title: 插件/message 工具: make Discord `components` 和 Slack `blocks` optional 重新, 和 route 飞书 `message(..., media=...)` sends through the outbound media 路径, so pin/unpin/react flows 停止 failing schema validation 和 飞书 file/image attachments actually send. 修复 #52970 和 #52962. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/message tool: make Discord `components` and Slack `blocks` optional again, and route Feishu `message(..., media=...)` sends through the outbound media path, so pin/unpin/react flows stop failing schema validation and Feishu file/image attachments actually send. Fixes #52970 and #52962. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 诊断工具/WhatsApp: 停止 auto-启用 从 appending built-在 channel ids like `WhatsApp` to `插件.允许`, so `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` no longer writes schema-invalid 插件 allowlist entries 当 repairing built-在 channels. 修复 #52931. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Doctor/WhatsApp: stop auto-enable from appending built-in channel ids like `whatsapp` to `plugins.allow`, so `openclaw doctor --fix` no longer writes schema-invalid plugin allowlist entries when repairing built-in channels. Fixes #52931. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Telegram/auto-reply: 保留 same-chat inbound debounce order 不适用 stranding stale busy-session followups, 和 keep same-密钥 overflow turns ordered 当 tracked debounce keys are saturated. (#52998) Thanks @osolmaz.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/auto-reply: preserve same-chat inbound debounce order without stranding stale busy-session followups, and keep same-key overflow turns ordered when tracked debounce keys are saturated. (#52998) Thanks @osolmaz.

items.title: Telegram/message 工具: 添加 `asDocument` as a user-facing alias 为了 `forceDocument` 在 image 和 GIF sends, while preserving explicit `forceDocument` precedence 当 both flags are present. (#52461) Thanks @bakhtiersizhaev.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/message tool: add `asDocument` as a user-facing alias for `forceDocument` on image and GIF sends, while preserving explicit `forceDocument` precedence when both flags are present. (#52461) Thanks @bakhtiersizhaev.

items.title: Discord/commands: return an explicit unauthorized reply 为了 privileged native slash commands 而不是 falling through to Discord's misleading generic completion 当 认证 gates reject the sender. 修复 #53041. Thanks @scoootscooob.
items.rawTitle: Discord/commands: return an explicit unauthorized reply for privileged native slash commands instead of falling through to Discord's misleading generic completion when auth gates reject the sender. Fixes #53041. Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.title: Channels/catalog: let external channel catalogs override shipped fallback metadata 和 honor overridden npm specs 期间 channel setup, so custom channel catalogs no longer fall back to bundled packages 当 a channel id matches. (#52988)
items.rawTitle: Channels/catalog: let external channel catalogs override shipped fallback metadata and honor overridden npm specs during channel setup, so custom channel catalogs no longer fall back to bundled packages when a channel id matches. (#52988)

items.title: 插件/ClawHub: 解决 插件 API compatibility against the active runtime version at install time, 和 添加 regression coverage 为了 current `>=2026.3.22` ClawHub package checks so installs no longer fail behind the stale `1.2.0` constant. (#53157) Thanks @futhgar.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: resolve plugin API compatibility against the active runtime version at install time, and add regression coverage for current `>=2026.3.22` ClawHub package checks so installs no longer fail behind the stale `1.2.0` constant. (#53157) Thanks @futhgar.

items.title: 插件/uninstall: accept installed `ClawHub:` specs 和 versionless ClawHub package names as uninstall targets, so `openclaw 插件 uninstall ClawHub:<package>` works 重新 even 当 the recorded install was pinned to a version.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: accept installed `clawhub:` specs and versionless ClawHub package names as uninstall targets, so `openclaw plugins uninstall clawhub:<package>` works again even when the recorded install was pinned to a version.

items.title: ClawHub/macOS 认证: honor macOS 认证 配置 和 XDG 认证 paths 为了 saved ClawHub credentials, so `openclaw skills ...` 和 网关 skill browsing keep using the signed-在 认证 state 而不是 静默地 falling back to unauthenticated mode. 修复 #53034.
items.rawTitle: ClawHub/macOS auth: honor macOS auth config and XDG auth paths for saved ClawHub credentials, so `openclaw skills ...` and gateway skill browsing keep using the signed-in auth state instead of silently falling back to unauthenticated mode. Fixes #53034.

items.title: ClawHub/macOS: read the local ClawHub login 从 the macOS Application 支持 路径 和 still honor XDG 配置 在 macOS, so skill browsing uses the logged-在 令牌 在 both default 和 XDG-style setups. 修复 #52949. Thanks @scoootscooob.
items.rawTitle: ClawHub/macOS: read the local ClawHub login from the macOS Application Support path and still honor XDG config on macOS, so skill browsing uses the logged-in token on both default and XDG-style setups. Fixes #52949. Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.title: ClawHub/skills: 解决 the local ClawHub 认证 令牌 为了 网关 skill browsing 和 switch browse-all requests to search so ClawControl stops falling 进入 unauthenticated 429s 和 empty authenticated skill lists. 修复 #52949. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: ClawHub/skills: resolve the local ClawHub auth token for gateway skill browsing and switch browse-all requests to search so ClawControl stops falling into unauthenticated 429s and empty authenticated skill lists. Fixes #52949. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 诊断工具/插件: make `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` 移除 stale `插件.允许` 和 `插件.entries` refs left behind 之后 插件 removal. Thanks @sallyom
items.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: make `openclaw doctor --fix` remove stale `plugins.allow` and `plugins.entries` refs left behind after plugin removal. Thanks @sallyom

items.title: 模型/OpenAI Codex OAuth认证 和 插件/MiniMax OAuth认证: 确保 env-configured HTTP/HTTPS 代理 dispatchers are initialized 之前 OAuth认证 preflight 和 令牌 exchange requests so 代理-required environments can complete MiniMax 和 OpenAI Codex sign-在 flows 重新. (#52228; 修复 #51619, #51569) Thanks @openperf.
items.rawTitle: Models/OpenAI Codex OAuth and Plugins/MiniMax OAuth: ensure env-configured HTTP/HTTPS proxy dispatchers are initialized before OAuth preflight and token exchange requests so proxy-required environments can complete MiniMax and OpenAI Codex sign-in flows again. (#52228; fixes #51619, #51569) Thanks @openperf.

items.title: 配置/插件: treat stale unknown `插件.允许` ids as warnings 而不是 fatal 配置 errors, so recovery commands like `插件 install`, `诊断工具 --修复`, 和 `status` still run 当 a 插件 is missing locally. 修复 #52992. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Config/plugins: treat stale unknown `plugins.allow` ids as warnings instead of fatal config errors, so recovery commands like `plugins install`, `doctor --fix`, and `status` still run when a plugin is missing locally. Fixes #52992. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/skills: prefer the active resolved runtime snapshot 为了 embedded skill 配置 和 env injection, so `skills.entries.<skill>.apiKey` SecretRefs 解决 正确地 期间 embedded startup 而不是 failing 在 raw source 配置. 修复 #53098. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Agents/skills: prefer the active resolved runtime snapshot for embedded skill config and env injection, so `skills.entries.<skill>.apiKey` SecretRefs resolve correctly during embedded startup instead of failing on raw source config. Fixes #53098. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 插件/DeepSeek: refactor the bundled DeepSeek provider onto the shared single-provider 插件 entry, move its coverage 进入 the extension test lane, 和 keep bundled 认证 env-var metadata 在 the generated manifest 路径. (#48762) Thanks @07akioni.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/DeepSeek: refactor the bundled DeepSeek provider onto the shared single-provider plugin entry, move its coverage into the extension test lane, and keep bundled auth env-var metadata on the generated manifest path. (#48762) Thanks @07akioni.

items.title: 插件/Matrix: 避免 duplicate `resolveMatrixAccountStringValues` runtime-API exports under Jiti so bundled Matrix installs no longer 崩溃 at startup 使用 `Cannot redefine property: resolveMatrixAccountStringValues`. 修复 #52909 和 #52891. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: avoid duplicate `resolveMatrixAccountStringValues` runtime-api exports under Jiti so bundled Matrix installs no longer crash at startup with `Cannot redefine property: resolveMatrixAccountStringValues`. Fixes #52909 and #52891. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Release/install: keep previously released bundled 插件 和 Control 界面 assets 在 published openclaw npm installs, 和 fail release checks 当 those shipped artifacts are missing. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Release/install: keep previously released bundled plugins and Control UI assets in published openclaw npm installs, and fail release checks when those shipped artifacts are missing. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/web_search: use the active runtime `web_search` provider 而不是 stale/default selection, so Agent turns keep hitting the provider you actually configured. 修复 #53020. Thanks @jzakirov.
items.rawTitle: Agents/web_search: use the active runtime `web_search` provider instead of stale/default selection, so agent turns keep hitting the provider you actually configured. Fixes #53020. Thanks @jzakirov.

items.title: LINE/runtime-API: pre-export overlapping runtime symbols 之前 the `line-runtime` star export so jiti no longer throws `TypeError: Cannot redefine property` 在 startup. (#53221) Thanks @Drickon.
items.rawTitle: LINE/runtime-api: pre-export overlapping runtime symbols before the `line-runtime` star export so jiti no longer throws `TypeError: Cannot redefine property` on startup. (#53221) Thanks @Drickon.

items.title: Agent/replay: canonicalize malformed assistant transcript content 之前 session-history sanitization so legacy 或 corrupted assistant turns 停止 crashing Pi replay 和 subagent recovery paths.
items.rawTitle: Agents/replay: canonicalize malformed assistant transcript content before session-history sanitization so legacy or corrupted assistant turns stop crashing Pi replay and subagent recovery paths.

items.title: Agent/subagents: recheck timed-out worker waits against the latest runtime snapshot 之前 sending completion events, so fast-finishing workers 停止 being reported as timed out 当 they actually succeeded. 修复 #53106. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: recheck timed-out worker waits against the latest runtime snapshot before sending completion events, so fast-finishing workers stop being reported as timed out when they actually succeeded. Fixes #53106. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/认证: require 认证 为了 canvas routes 和 admin scope 为了 Agent session reset, so anonymous canvas access 和 non-admin reset requests fail closed.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: require auth for canvas routes and admin scope for agent session reset, so anonymous canvas access and non-admin reset requests fail closed.

items.title: 配置/warnings: suppress the confusing “newer OpenClaw” warning 当 a 配置 written 通过 a same-base correction release like `2026.3.23-2` is read 通过 `2026.3.23`, while still warning 为了 truly newer 或 incompatible versions.
items.rawTitle: Config/warnings: suppress the confusing “newer OpenClaw” warning when a config written by a same-base correction release like `2026.3.23-2` is read by `2026.3.23`, while still warning for truly newer or incompatible versions.

items.title: Diagnostics/cache trace: strip credential fields 从 cache-trace JSONL output while preserving non-sensitive diagnostic fields 和 image redaction metadata.
items.rawTitle: Diagnostics/cache trace: strip credential fields from cache-trace JSONL output while preserving non-sensitive diagnostic fields and image redaction metadata.

items.title: 网关/probe: 停止 successful 网关 handshakes 从 timing out as unreachable while post-connect detail RPCs are still loading, so slow devices report a reachable RPC failure 而不是 a false negative dead 网关. 修复 #52927. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/probe: stop successful gateway handshakes from timing out as unreachable while post-connect detail RPCs are still loading, so slow devices report a reachable RPC failure instead of a false negative dead gateway. Fixes #52927. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/supervision: 停止 lock conflicts 从 崩溃-looping under launchd 和 systemd 通过 keeping the duplicate process 在 a 重试 wait 而不是 exiting as a failure while another healthy 网关 still owns the lock. 修复 #52922. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/supervision: stop lock conflicts from crash-looping under launchd and systemd by keeping the duplicate process in a retry wait instead of exiting as a failure while another healthy gateway still owns the lock. Fixes #52922. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: CLI/cron: make `openclaw cron 添加|edit --at ... --tz <iana>` honor the requested local wall-clock time 为了 offset-less one-shot datetimes, including DST boundaries, 和 keep `--tz` rejected 为了 `--every`. (#53224) Thanks @RolfHegr.
items.rawTitle: CLI/cron: make `openclaw cron add|edit --at ... --tz <iana>` honor the requested local wall-clock time for offset-less one-shot datetimes, including DST boundaries, and keep `--tz` rejected for `--every`. (#53224) Thanks @RolfHegr.

items.title: Infra/exec trust: 保留 shell-multiplexer wrapper binaries 为了 policy checks 不适用 破坏性变更 approved-命令 reconstruction, so BusyBox/ToyBox allowlist 和 audit flows bind to the real wrapper while execution plans stay coherent. (#53134) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Infra/exec trust: preserve shell-multiplexer wrapper binaries for policy checks without breaking approved-command reconstruction, so BusyBox/ToyBox allowlist and audit flows bind to the real wrapper while execution plans stay coherent. (#53134) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 语音-call/Plivo: stabilize Plivo v2 replay keys so Webhook retries 和 replay protection 停止 colliding 在 valid follow-up deliveries.
items.rawTitle: Voice-call/Plivo: stabilize Plivo v2 replay keys so webhook retries and replay protection stop colliding on valid follow-up deliveries.

changes.title: 插件/install: bare `openclaw 插件 install <package>` 现在 prefers ClawHub 之前 npm 为了 npm-safe names, 和 only falls back to npm 当 ClawHub does not have that package 或 version. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/ClawHub
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: bare `openclaw plugins install <package>` now prefers ClawHub before npm for npm-safe names, and only falls back to npm when ClawHub does not have that package or version. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/clawhub

changes.title: 浏览器/Chrome MCP协议: 移除 the legacy Chrome extension relay 路径, bundled extension assets, `driver: "extension"`, 和 `浏览器.relayBindHost`. Run `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` to migrate host-local 浏览器 配置 to `existing-session` / `user`; Docker, headless, sandbox, 和 remote 浏览器 flows still use raw CDP. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/网关/诊断工具 和 https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/浏览器 (#47893) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome MCP: remove the legacy Chrome extension relay path, bundled extension assets, `driver: "extension"`, and `browser.relayBindHost`. Run `openclaw doctor --fix` to migrate host-local browser config to `existing-session` / `user`; Docker, headless, sandbox, and remote browser flows still use raw CDP. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/doctor and https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/browser (#47893) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Tools/image generation: standardize the stock image create/edit 路径 在 the core `image_generate` 工具. The old `nano-banana-pro` docs/examples are gone; if you previously copied that sample-skill 配置, switch to `Agent.defaults.imageGenerationModel` 为了 built-在 image generation 或 install a separate third-party skill explicitly.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/image generation: standardize the stock image create/edit path on the core `image_generate` tool. The old `nano-banana-pro` docs/examples are gone; if you previously copied that sample-skill config, switch to `agents.defaults.imageGenerationModel` for built-in image generation or install a separate third-party skill explicitly.

changes.title: Skills/image generation: 移除 the bundled `nano-banana-pro` skill wrapper. Use `Agent.defaults.imageGenerationModel.primary: "google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview"` 为了 the native Nano Banana-style 路径 instead.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/image generation: remove the bundled `nano-banana-pro` skill wrapper. Use `agents.defaults.imageGenerationModel.primary: "google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview"` for the native Nano Banana-style path instead.

changes.title: 插件/SDK: the new public 插件 SDK surface is `openclaw/插件-sdk/*`; `openclaw/extension-API` is removed 使用 no compatibility shim. Bundled 插件 must use injected runtime 为了 host-side operations (为了 example `API.runtime.Agent.runEmbeddedPiAgent`) 和 any remaining direct imports must come 从 narrow `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` subpaths 而不是 the monolithic SDK root. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/插件/sdk-migration 和 https://docs.openclaw.ai/插件/sdk-overview
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/SDK: the new public plugin SDK surface is `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*`; `openclaw/extension-api` is removed with no compatibility shim. Bundled plugins must use injected runtime for host-side operations (for example `api.runtime.agent.runEmbeddedPiAgent`) and any remaining direct imports must come from narrow `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` subpaths instead of the monolithic SDK root. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/sdk-migration and https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/sdk-overview

changes.title: 插件/message discovery: require `ChannelMessageActionAdapter.describeMessageTool(...)` 为了 shared `message` 工具 discovery. The legacy `listActions`, `getCapabilities`, 和 `getToolSchema` adapter methods are removed. 插件 authors should migrate message discovery to `describeMessageTool(...)` 和 keep channel-specific action runtime code inside the owning 插件 package. Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/message discovery: require `ChannelMessageActionAdapter.describeMessageTool(...)` for shared `message` tool discovery. The legacy `listActions`, `getCapabilities`, and `getToolSchema` adapter methods are removed. Plugin authors should migrate message discovery to `describeMessageTool(...)` and keep channel-specific action runtime code inside the owning plugin package. Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 插件/Matrix: 添加 a new Matrix 插件 backed 通过 the official `matrix-js-sdk`. If you are upgrading 从 the previous public Matrix 插件, follow the migration guide: https://docs.openclaw.ai/install/migrating-matrix Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: add a new Matrix plugin backed by the official `matrix-js-sdk`. If you are upgrading from the previous public Matrix plugin, follow the migration guide: https://docs.openclaw.ai/install/migrating-matrix Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 配置/env: 移除 legacy `CLAWDBOT_*` 和 `MOLTBOT_*` compatibility env names across runtime, installers, 和 test tooling. Use the matching `OPENCLAW_*` env names instead.
changes.rawTitle: Config/env: remove legacy `CLAWDBOT_*` and `MOLTBOT_*` compatibility env names across runtime, installers, and test tooling. Use the matching `OPENCLAW_*` env names instead.

changes.title: 配置/state: 移除 legacy `.moltbot` state-dir 和 `moltbot.json` auto-detection/migration fallback. If you still keep state under `~/.moltbot`, move it to `~/.openclaw` 或 set `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` / `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` explicitly. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/install/migrating 和 https://docs.openclaw.ai/start/getting-started
changes.rawTitle: Config/state: remove legacy `.moltbot` state-dir and `moltbot.json` auto-detection/migration fallback. changes.title: Exec/env sandbox: block build-工具 JVM injection (`MAVEN_OPTS`, `SBT_OPTS`, `GRADLE_OPTS`, `ANT_OPTS`), glibc tunable exploitation (`GLIBC_TUNABLES`), 和 .NET dependency resolution hijack (`DOTNET_ADDITIONAL_DEPS`) 从 the host exec environment, 和 restrict Gradle init script redirect (`GRADLE_USER_HOME`) as an override-only block so user-configured Gradle homes still propagate. (#49702)
changes.rawTitle: Exec/env sandbox: block build-tool JVM injection (`MAVEN_OPTS`, `SBT_OPTS`, `GRADLE_OPTS`, `ANT_OPTS`), glibc tunable exploitation (`GLIBC_TUNABLES`), and .NET dependency resolution hijack (`DOTNET_ADDITIONAL_DEPS`) from the host exec environment, and restrict Gradle init script redirect (`GRADLE_USER_HOME`) as an override-only block so user-configured Gradle homes still propagate. (#49702)

changes.title: Media/Windows 安全: block remote-host `file://` media URLs 和 UNC/network paths 之前 local filesystem resolution 在 core media loading 和 adjacent prompt/sandbox attachment seams, so the next release no longer allows structured local-media inputs to trigger outbound SMB credential handshakes 在 Windows. Thanks @RacerZ-fighting 为了 reporting.
changes.rawTitle: Media/Windows security: block remote-host `file://` media URLs and UNC/network paths before local filesystem resolution in core media loading and adjacent prompt/sandbox attachment seams, so the next release no longer allows structured local-media inputs to trigger outbound SMB credential handshakes on Windows. Thanks @RacerZ-fighting for reporting.

changes.title: Nostr/安全: enforce inbound DM policy 之前 decrypt, route Nostr DMs through the standard reply pipeline, 和 添加 pre-crypto rate 和 size guards so unknown senders cannot bypass pairing 或 force unbounded crypto work. Thanks @kuranikaran.

changes.rawTitle: Synology Chat/security: keep reply delivery bound to stable numeric `user_id` by default, and gate mutable username/nickname recipient lookup behind `dangerouslyAllowNameMatching` with new regression coverage. Thanks @nexrin.

changes.title: 网关/probe: honor caller `--超时` 为了 active local loopback probes 在 `网关 status`, keep inactive remote-mode loopback probes fast, 和 clamp probe timers to JS-safe bounds so slow local/container gateways 停止 reporting false timeouts. (#47533) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.

changes.title: 配置/startup: keep bundled web-search allowlist compatibility 在 a lightweight manifest 路径 so 配置 validation no longer pulls bundled web-search registry imports 进入 startup, while still avoiding accidental auto-允许 的 配置-loaded override 插件. (#51574) Thanks @RichardCao.

changes.title: 安全/exec safe bins: 移除 `jq` 从 the default safe-bin allowlist 和 fail closed 在 the `jq` `env` builtin 当 operators explicitly opt `jq` back 在, so `jq -n env` cannot dump host secrets 不适用 an explicit trust 路径. Thanks @gladiator9797 为了 reporting.

changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: escape blank Hangul filler code points in approval prompts across gateway/chat and the macOS native approval UI so visually empty Unicode padding cannot hide reviewed command text.

changes.title: 安全/exec: harden macOS allowlist resolution against wrapper 和 `env` spoofing, require fresh approval 为了 inline interpreter eval 使用 `tools.exec.strictInlineEval`, wrap Discord guild message bodies as untrusted external content, 和 添加 audit findings 为了 risky exec approval 和 open-channel combinations.

changes.rawTitle: Security/network: harden explicit-proxy SSRF pinning by translating target-hop transport hints onto HTTPS proxy tunnels and failing closed for plain HTTP guarded fetches that cannot preserve pinned DNS.

changes.title: 安全/Synology Chat: require explicit per-account Webhook paths 为了 multi-account setups 通过 default, reject duplicate exact Webhook paths fail-closed, 和 keep inherited-路径 behavior behind an explicit dangerous opt-在 so shared routes can no longer collapse DM policy contexts across accounts. changes.rawTitle: Security/Synology Chat: require explicit per-account webhook paths for multi-account setups by default, reject duplicate exact webhook paths fail-closed, and keep inherited-path behavior behind an explicit dangerous opt-in so shared routes can no longer collapse DM policy contexts across accounts. changes.title: Web search/onboarding: clarify provider labels, 密钥 prompts, 和 missing-密钥 notes so setup/configure more clearly names the required provider credential 为了 Gemini, Kimi, Grok, Brave Search, Firecrawl, Perplexity, 和 Tavily. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Web search/onboarding: clarify provider labels, key prompts, and missing-key notes so setup/configure more clearly names the required provider credential for Gemini, Kimi, Grok, Brave Search, Firecrawl, Perplexity, and Tavily. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: macOS/canvas actions: keep unattended local Agent actions 在 trusted 在-app canvas surfaces only, 和 停止 exposing the deep-link fallback 密钥 to arbitrary page scripts. (#46790) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/canvas actions: keep unattended local agent actions on trusted in-app canvas surfaces only, and stop exposing the deep-link fallback key to arbitrary page scripts. (#46790) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: extend the enclosing run deadline once while compaction is actively 在 flight, 和 abort the underlying SDK compaction 在 超时/cancel so large-session compactions 停止 freezing mid-run. (#46889) Thanks @asyncjason.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: extend the enclosing run deadline once while compaction is actively in flight, and abort the underlying SDK compaction on timeout/cancel so large-session compactions stop freezing mid-run. (#46889) Thanks @asyncjason.

changes.title: 网关/Telegram shutdown: abort stalled Telegram polling fetches 在 shutdown, clean up per-cycle abort listeners, 和 keep the 在-process watchdog ahead 的 supervisor 停止 timeouts so SIGTERM no longer leaves zombie gateways behind. (#51242) Thanks @juliabush.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Telegram shutdown: abort stalled Telegram polling fetches on shutdown, clean up per-cycle abort listeners, and keep the in-process watchdog ahead of supervisor stop timeouts so SIGTERM no longer leaves zombie gateways behind. (#51242) Thanks @juliabush.

changes.title: Telegram/setup: warn 当 setup leaves DMs 在 pairing 不适用 an allowlist, 和 show valid account-scoped remediation commands. (#50710) Thanks @ernestodeoliveira.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/setup: warn when setup leaves DMs on pairing without an allowlist, and show valid account-scoped remediation commands. (#50710) Thanks @ernestodeoliveira.

changes.title: 诊断工具/Telegram: replace the fresh-install empty group-allowlist false positive 使用 first-run guidance that explains DM pairing approval 和 the next group setup steps, so new Telegram installs get actionable setup help 而不是 a broken-配置 warning. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/Telegram: replace the fresh-install empty group-allowlist false positive with first-run guidance that explains DM pairing approval and the next group setup steps, so new Telegram installs get actionable setup help instead of a broken-config warning. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/extensions: keep Matrix DM `allowFrom` repairs 在 the canonical `dm.allowFrom` 路径 和 停止 treating Zalouser group sender gating as if it fell back to `allowFrom`, so 诊断工具 warnings 和 `--修复` stay aligned 使用 runtime access control. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/extensions: keep Matrix DM `allowFrom` repairs on the canonical `dm.allowFrom` path and stop treating Zalouser group sender gating as if it fell back to `allowFrom`, so doctor warnings and `--fix` stay aligned with runtime access control. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/refactor: centralize built-在 channel 诊断工具 semantics 在 one static capability registry 使用 conservative fallback behavior 为了 unknown/external channels, so future extension changes 停止 depending 在 scattered shared string checks. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/refactor: centralize built-in channel doctor semantics in one static capability registry with conservative fallback behavior for unknown/external channels, so future extension changes stop depending on scattered shared string checks. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Channels/插件: keep shared interactive payloads merge-ready 通过 fixing Slack custom callback routing 和 repeat-click dedupe, allowing interactive-only sends, 和 preserving ordered Discord shared text blocks. (#47715) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/plugins: keep shared interactive payloads merge-ready by fixing Slack custom callback routing and repeat-click dedupe, allowing interactive-only sends, and preserving ordered Discord shared text blocks. (#47715) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Slack/interactive replies: 保留 `channelData.Slack.blocks` through live DM delivery 和 preview-finalized edits so Block Kit button 和 select directives render 而不是 falling back to raw text. (#45890) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/interactive replies: preserve `channelData.slack.blocks` through live DM delivery and preview-finalized edits so Block Kit button and select directives render instead of falling back to raw text. (#45890) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 飞书/actions: expand the runtime action surface 使用 message read/edit, explicit thread replies, pinning, 和 operator-facing chat/member inspection so 飞书 can operate more 的 the workspace directly. (#47968) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/actions: expand the runtime action surface with message read/edit, explicit thread replies, pinning, and operator-facing chat/member inspection so Feishu can operate more of the workspace directly. (#47968) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: 飞书/topic threads: fetch full thread context, including prior bot replies, 当 starting a topic-thread session so follow-up turns 在 飞书 topics keep the right conversation state. (#45254) Thanks @Coobiw.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/topic threads: fetch full thread context, including prior bot replies, when starting a topic-thread session so follow-up turns in Feishu topics keep the right conversation state. (#45254) Thanks @Coobiw.

changes.title: 飞书/media: keep native image, file, audio, 和 video/media handling aligned across outbound sends, inbound downloads, thread replies, directory/action aliases, 和 capability docs so unsupported areas are explicit 而不是 implied. (#47968) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/media: keep native image, file, audio, and video/media handling aligned across outbound sends, inbound downloads, thread replies, directory/action aliases, and capability docs so unsupported areas are explicit instead of implied. (#47968) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: 飞书/webhooks: harden signed Webhook verification to use constant-time signature comparison 和 keep malformed short signatures fail-closed 在 Webhook E2E coverage.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/webhooks: harden signed webhook verification to use constant-time signature comparison and keep malformed short signatures fail-closed in webhook E2E coverage.

changes.title: Telegram/message send: forward `--force-document` through the `sendPayload` 路径 as well as `sendMedia`, so Telegram payload sends 使用 `channelData` keep uploading images as documents 而不是 静默地 falling back to compressed photo sends. (#47119) Thanks @thepagent.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/message send: forward `--force-document` through the `sendPayload` path as well as `sendMedia`, so Telegram payload sends with `channelData` keep uploading images as documents instead of silently falling back to compressed photo sends. (#47119) Thanks @thepagent.

changes.title: Telegram/message chunking: 保留 spaces, paragraph separators, 和 word boundaries 当 HTML overflow rechunking splits formatted replies. (#47274) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/message chunking: preserve spaces, paragraph separators, and word boundaries when HTML overflow rechunking splits formatted replies. (#47274) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Z.AI/onboarding: detect a working default 模型 even 为了 explicit `zai-coding-*` endpoint choices, so Coding Plan setup can keep the selected endpoint while defaulting to `glm-5` 当 available 或 `glm-4.7` as fallback. (#45969) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Z.AI/onboarding: detect a working default model even for explicit `zai-coding-*` endpoint choices, so Coding Plan setup can keep the selected endpoint while defaulting to `glm-5` when available or `glm-4.7` as fallback. (#45969) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: CI/onboarding smoke: surface `确保-base-commit` fetch failures as workflow warnings 和 fail the onboarding Docker smoke 当 expected setup prompts drift 而不是 continuing 静默地. Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: CI/onboarding smoke: surface `ensure-base-commit` fetch failures as workflow warnings and fail the onboarding Docker smoke when expected setup prompts drift instead of continuing silently. Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: Z.AI/onboarding: 添加 `glm-5-turbo` to the default Z.AI provider catalog so onboarding-generated configs expose the new 模型 alongside the existing GLM defaults. (#46670) Thanks @tomsun28.
changes.rawTitle: Z.AI/onboarding: add `glm-5-turbo` to the default Z.AI provider catalog so onboarding-generated configs expose the new model alongside the existing GLM defaults. (#46670) Thanks @tomsun28.

changes.title: Zalo Personal/group gating: 停止 reapplying `dmPolicy.allowFrom` as a sender gate 为了 already-allowlisted groups 当 `groupAllowFrom` is unset, so any member 的 an allowed group can trigger replies while DMs stay restricted. (#46663) 修复 #40146. Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Zalo Personal/group gating: stop reapplying `dmPolicy.allowFrom` as a sender gate for already-allowlisted groups when `groupAllowFrom` is unset, so any member of an allowed group can trigger replies while DMs stay restricted. (#46663) Fixes #40146. Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: Zalo/插件 runtime: export `resolveClientIp` 从 `openclaw/插件-sdk/zalo` so installed builds no longer 崩溃 在 startup 当 the Webhook monitor loads 从 the packaged extension 而不是 the monorepo source tree. (#46549) Thanks @No898.
changes.rawTitle: Zalo/plugin runtime: export `resolveClientIp` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/zalo` so installed builds no longer crash on startup when the webhook monitor loads from the packaged extension instead of the monorepo source tree. (#46549) Thanks @No898.

changes.title: Docker/live tests: mount external CLI 认证 homes 进入 writable container copies, derive Codex OAuth认证 expiry 从 JWT `exp`, refresh synced CLI creds 而不是 trusting stale cached expiry, 和 make 网关 live probes wait 在 transcript output so `pnpm test:docker:all` stays green 在 Linux.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/live tests: mount external CLI auth homes into writable container copies, derive Codex OAuth expiry from JWT `exp`, refresh synced CLI creds instead of trusting stale cached expiry, and make gateway live probes wait on transcript output so `pnpm test:docker:all` stays green in Linux.

changes.title: 网关/watch mode: restart 在 bundled-插件 package 和 manifest metadata changes, rebuild `dist` 为了 extension source 和 `tsdown.配置.ts` changes, 和 still ignore extension docs. (#47571) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/watch mode: restart on bundled-plugin package and manifest metadata changes, rebuild `dist` for extension source and `tsdown.config.ts` changes, and still ignore extension docs. (#47571) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 网关/watch mode: recreate bundled 插件 runtime metadata 之后 clean 或 stale `dist` states, so `pnpm 网关:watch` no longer fails 在 missing `dist/extensions/*/openclaw.插件.json` manifests 之后 a rebuild. Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/watch mode: recreate bundled plugin runtime metadata after clean or stale `dist` states, so `pnpm gateway:watch` no longer fails on missing `dist/extensions/*/openclaw.plugin.json` manifests after a rebuild. Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Control 界面: scope persisted session selection per 网关, 防止 stale session bleed across tokenized 网关 opens, 和 cap stored 网关 session history. (#47453) Thanks @sallyom.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: scope persisted session selection per gateway, prevent stale session bleed across tokenized gateway opens, and cap stored gateway session history. (#47453) Thanks @sallyom.

changes.title: 模型/OpenAI Codex OAuth认证: start the remote manual-input race 为了 Codex login 和 keep the pasted-input prompt aligned 使用 the actual accepted values, so remote/VPS 认证 no longer stalls waiting 在 an unreachable localhost callback. (#51631) Thanks @cash-echo-bot.
changes.rawTitle: Models/OpenAI Codex OAuth: start the remote manual-input race for Codex login and keep the pasted-input prompt aligned with the actual accepted values, so remote/VPS auth no longer stalls waiting on an unreachable localhost callback. (#51631) Thanks @cash-echo-bot.

changes.title: Group mention gating: reject invalid 和 unsafe nested-repetition `mentionPatterns`, 复用 the shared safe 配置-regex compiler across mention stripping 和 detection, 和 cache strip-time regex compilation so noisy groups 避免 repeated recompiles.
changes.rawTitle: Group mention gating: reject invalid and unsafe nested-repetition `mentionPatterns`, reuse the shared safe config-regex compiler across mention stripping and detection, and cache strip-time regex compilation so noisy groups avoid repeated recompiles.

changes.title: 浏览器/profiles: drop the auto-created `Chrome-relay` 浏览器 profile; users who need the Chrome extension relay must 现在 create their own profile via `openclaw 浏览器 create-profile`. (#46596) 修复 #45777. Thanks @odysseus0.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/profiles: drop the auto-created `chrome-relay` browser profile; users who need the Chrome extension relay must now create their own profile via `openclaw browser create-profile`. (#46596) Fixes #45777. Thanks @odysseus0.

changes.title: CI/channel test routing: move the built-在 channel suites 进入 `test:channels` 和 keep them out 的 `test:extensions`, so extension CI no longer fails 之后 the channel migration while targeted test routing still sends Slack, Signal, 和 iMessage suites to the right lane. (#46066) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: CI/channel test routing: move the built-in channel suites into `test:channels` and keep them out of `test:extensions`, so extension CI no longer fails after the channel migration while targeted test routing still sends Slack, Signal, and iMessage suites to the right lane. (#46066) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 网关/配置 validation: 停止 treating the implicit default 内存 slot as a required explicit 插件 配置, so startup no longer fails 使用 `插件.slots.内存: 插件 not found: 内存-core` 当 `内存-core` was only inferred. (#47494) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/config validation: stop treating the implicit default memory slot as a required explicit plugin config, so startup no longer fails with `plugins.slots.memory: plugin not found: memory-core` when `memory-core` was only inferred. (#47494) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.rawTitle: Tlon: honor explicit empty allowlists and defer cite expansion. (#46788) Thanks @zpbrent and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Tlon/DM 认证: defer cited-message expansion until 之后 DM authorization 和 owner 命令 handling, so unauthorized DMs 和 owner approval/admin commands no longer trigger cross-channel cite fetches 之前 the deny 或 命令 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Tlon/DM auth: defer cited-message expansion until after DM authorization and owner command handling, so unauthorized DMs and owner approval/admin commands no longer trigger cross-channel cite fetches before the deny or command path.

changes.title: 网关/Agent events: 停止 broadcasting false end-的-run `seq gap` errors to clients, 和 isolate node-driven ingress turns 使用 per-turn run IDs so stale tail events cannot leak 进入 later session runs. (#43751) Thanks @caesargattuso.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/agent events: stop broadcasting false end-of-run `seq gap` errors to clients, and isolate node-driven ingress turns with per-turn run IDs so stale tail events cannot leak into later session runs. (#43751) Thanks @caesargattuso.

changes.rawTitle: Nodes/pending actions: re-check queued foreground actions against the current node command policy before returning them to the node. (#46815) Thanks @zpbrent and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Windows/网关 status: accept `schtasks` `Last Result` output as an alias 为了 `Last Run Result`, so running scheduled-task installs no longer show `Runtime: unknown`. (#47844) Thanks @MoerAI.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/gateway status: accept `schtasks` `Last Result` output as an alias for `Last Run Result`, so running scheduled-task installs no longer show `Runtime: unknown`. (#47844) Thanks @MoerAI.

changes.title: ACP/acpx: 解决 the bundled 插件 root 从 the actual 插件 directory so 插件-local installs stay under `dist/extensions/acpx` 而不是 escaping to `dist/extensions` 和 failing runtime setup. (#47601) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/acpx: resolve the bundled plugin root from the actual plugin directory so plugin-local installs stay under `dist/extensions/acpx` instead of escaping to `dist/extensions` and failing runtime setup. (#47601) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: 网关/WS handshake: raise the default pre-认证 handshake 超时 to 10 seconds 和 添加 `OPENCLAW_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT_MS` as a runtime override so busy local gateways 停止 dropping healthy CLI connections at 3 seconds. (#49262) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/WS handshake: raise the default pre-auth handshake timeout to 10 seconds and add `OPENCLAW_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT_MS` as a runtime override so busy local gateways stop dropping healthy CLI connections at 3 seconds. (#49262) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

changes.title: 网关/websocket pairing bypass 为了 disabled 认证: skip device-pairing enforcement 为了 Control 界面 operator sessions 当 `网关.认证.mode=none`, so reverse-proxied dashboards no longer get stuck 在 `pairing required` despite 认证 being explicitly disabled. (#47148) Thanks @ademczuk.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/websocket pairing bypass for disabled auth: skip device-pairing enforcement for Control UI operator sessions when `gateway.auth.mode=none`, so reverse-proxied dashboards no longer get stuck on `pairing required` despite auth being explicitly disabled. changes.title: Agent/usage tracking: 停止 forcing `supportsUsageInStreaming: false` 在 non-native OpenAI-completions providers so compatible backends report 令牌 usage 和 cost 重新 而不是 showing all zeros. (#46500) 修复 #46142. Thanks @ademczuk.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/usage tracking: stop forcing `supportsUsageInStreaming: false` on non-native OpenAI-completions providers so compatible backends report token usage and cost again instead of showing all zeros. (#46500) Fixes #46142. Thanks @ademczuk.

changes.title: ACP/acpx: keep 插件-local backend installs under `extensions/acpx` 在 live repo checkouts so rebuilds no longer delete the runtime binary, 和 避免 package-lock churn 期间 runtime repair.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/acpx: keep plugin-local backend installs under `extensions/acpx` in live repo checkouts so rebuilds no longer delete the runtime binary, and avoid package-lock churn during runtime repair.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: rerun transcript repair 之后 `session.compact()` so orphaned `tool_result` blocks cannot survive compaction 和 break later Anthropic requests. (#16095) thanks @claw-sylphx.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: rerun transcript repair after `session.compact()` so orphaned `tool_result` blocks cannot survive compaction and break later Anthropic requests. (#16095) thanks @claw-sylphx.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: trigger overflow recovery 从 the 工具-result guard once post-compaction context still exceeds the safe threshold, so long 工具 loops compact 之前 the next 模型 call hard-fails. (#29371) thanks @keshav55.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: trigger overflow recovery from the tool-result guard once post-compaction context still exceeds the safe threshold, so long tool loops compact before the next model call hard-fails. (#29371) thanks @keshav55.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/exec approvals: surface requested env override keys in gateway-host approval prompts so operators can review surviving env context without inheriting noisy base host env.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: write minimal boundary summaries for empty preparations while keeping split-turn prefixes on the normal path, so no-summarizable-message sessions stop retriggering the safeguard loop. (#42215) thanks @lml2468.

changes.rawTitle: Channels: stabilize lane harness and monitor tests (#50167) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: add an opt-in post-compaction session JSONL truncation step that drops summarized transcript entries while preserving the retained branch tail and live session metadata. (#41021) thanks @thirumaleshp.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/routing: fail loud when `message send` targets an unknown non-default Telegram `accountId`, instead of silently falling back to the channel-level bot token and sending through the wrong bot. (#50853) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.rawTitle: Web search: align onboarding, configure, and finalize with plugin-owned provider contracts, including disabled-provider recovery, config-aware credential hooks, and runtime-visible summaries. (#50935) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Agent/replay: sanitize malformed assistant 工具-call replay blocks 之前 provider replay so follow-up Anthropic requests do not inherit the downstream `replace` 崩溃. (#50005) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replay: sanitize malformed assistant tool-call replay blocks before provider replay so follow-up Anthropic requests do not inherit the downstream `replace` crash. (#50005) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: Discord/startup logging: report client initialization while the 网关 is still connecting 而不是 claiming Discord is logged 在 之前 readiness is reached. (#51425) Thanks @scoootscoob.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/startup logging: report client initialization while the gateway is still connecting instead of claiming Discord is logged in before readiness is reached. (#51425) Thanks @scoootscoob.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction safeguard: preserve split-turn context and preserved recent turns when capped retry fallback reuses the last successful summary. (#27727) thanks @Pandadadadazxf.

changes.title: Agent/内存 flush: keep transcript-hash dedup active across 内存-flush fallback retries so a write-then-throw flush attempt cannot append duplicate `内存.md` entries 之前 the fallback cycle completes. (#34222) Thanks @lml2468.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/memory flush: keep transcript-hash dedup active across memory-flush fallback retries so a write-then-throw flush attempt cannot append duplicate `MEMORY.md` entries before the fallback cycle completes. (#34222) Thanks @lml2468.

changes.title: Discord/ACP: forward worker abort signals 进入 ACP turns so timed-out Discord jobs cancel the running turn 而不是 静默地 leaving the bound ACP session working 在 the background.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/ACP: forward worker abort signals into ACP turns so timed-out Discord jobs cancel the running turn instead of silently leaving the bound ACP session working in the background.

changes.title: ACP/Codex session replay: 保留 hidden assistant thinking 当 loading 或 rebinding existing ACP sessions so stored thought chunks do not replay 进入 visible assistant text. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/Codex session replay: preserve hidden assistant thinking when loading or rebinding existing ACP sessions so stored thought chunks do not replay into visible assistant text. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/commands: keep internal `chat.send` slash-命令 UX while requiring `operator.admin` 之前 internal callers can persist `/exec` defaults 或 mutate `phone-control` node policy through `/phone arm|disarm`.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/commands: keep internal `chat.send` slash-command UX while requiring `operator.admin` before internal callers can persist `/exec` defaults or mutate `phone-control` node policy through `/phone arm|disarm`.

changes.title: 插件/Matrix: move bundled 插件 `KeyedAsyncQueue` imports onto the stable `插件-sdk/core` surface so Matrix Docker/runtime builds do not depend 在 the brittle keyed-async-queue subpath. Thanks @ecohash-co 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: move bundled plugin `KeyedAsyncQueue` imports onto the stable `plugin-sdk/core` surface so Matrix Docker/runtime builds do not depend on the brittle keyed-async-queue subpath. Thanks @ecohash-co and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/context engines: enforce owner-aware context-engine registration 在 both loader 和 public SDK paths so 插件 cannot spoof privileged ownership, claim the core `legacy` engine id, 或 overwrite an existing engine id through direct SDK imports. (#47595) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/context engines: enforce owner-aware context-engine registration on both loader and public SDK paths so plugins cannot spoof privileged ownership, claim the core `legacy` engine id, or overwrite an existing engine id through direct SDK imports. (#47595) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/bundler TDZ: 修复 `RESERVED_COMMANDS` temporal dead zone 错误 that prevented device-pair, phone-control, 和 talk-语音 插件 从 registering 当 the bundler placed the commands module 之后 call sites 在 the same output chunk. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/bundler TDZ: fix `RESERVED_COMMANDS` temporal dead zone error that prevented device-pair, phone-control, and talk-voice plugins from registering when the bundler placed the commands module after call sites in the same output chunk. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 插件/imports: 修复 stale googlechat runtime-API import paths 和 Signal SDK circular re-exports broken 通过 recent 插件-sdk refactors. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/imports: fix stale googlechat runtime-api import paths and signal SDK circular re-exports broken by recent plugin-sdk refactors. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 插件/install precedence: keep bundled 插件 ahead 的 auto-discovered globals 通过 default, 但是 let an explicitly installed 插件 record win its own duplicate-id tie so installed channel 插件 load 从 `~/.openclaw/extensions` 之后 `openclaw 插件 install`. (#46722) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install precedence: keep bundled plugins ahead of auto-discovered globals by default, but let an explicitly installed plugin record win its own duplicate-id tie so installed channel plugins load from `~/.openclaw/extensions` after `openclaw plugins install`. (#46722) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: 插件/scoped ids: 保留 scoped 插件 ids 期间 install 和 配置 keying, 和 keep bundled 插件 ahead 的 discovered duplicate ids 通过 default so `@scope/name` 插件 no longer collide 使用 unscoped installs. (#47413) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/scoped ids: preserve scoped plugin ids during install and config keying, and keep bundled plugins ahead of discovered duplicate ids by default so `@scope/name` plugins no longer collide with unscoped installs. (#47413) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Docs/Mintlify: 修复 MDX marker syntax 在 Perplexity, 模型 Providers, Moonshot, 和 exec approvals pages so local docs preview no longer breaks rendering 或 leaves stale pages unpublished. (#46695) Thanks @velvet-shark.
changes.rawTitle: Docs/Mintlify: fix MDX marker syntax on Perplexity, Model Providers, Moonshot, and exec approvals pages so local docs preview no longer breaks rendering or leaves stale pages unpublished. (#46695) Thanks @velvet-shark.

changes.title: 插件/runtime barrels: route bundled extension runtime imports through public `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` subpaths 和 block relative cross-package escapes so packaged extensions 停止 depending 在 monorepo-only relative paths. (#51939) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime barrels: route bundled extension runtime imports through public `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` subpaths and block relative cross-package escapes so packaged extensions stop depending on monorepo-only relative paths. (#51939) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Docs/安全 audit: spell out that `网关.controlUi.allowedOrigins: ["*"]` is an explicit 允许-all 浏览器-origin policy 和 should be avoided outside tightly controlled local testing.
changes.rawTitle: Docs/security audit: spell out that `gateway.controlUi.allowedOrigins: ["*"]` is an explicit allow-all browser-origin policy and should be avoided outside tightly controlled local testing.

changes.title: 插件/subagents: 保留 网关-owned 插件 subagent access across runtime, 工具, 和 embedded-runner load paths so 网关 插件 tools 和 context engines can still spawn 和 manage subagents 之后 the loader cache split. (#46648) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/subagents: preserve gateway-owned plugin subagent access across runtime, tool, and embedded-runner load paths so gateway plugin tools and context engines can still spawn and manage subagents after the loader cache split. (#46648) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/subagents: forward per-run provider and model overrides through gateway plugin subagent dispatch so plugin-launched agent delegations honor explicit model selection again. (#48277) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/discovery: distinguish missing package entry files from package-path escape violations so startup skips absent plugin entry paths without raising false security diagnostics. (#52491) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: accept shared send-tool media aliases (`mediaUrl`, `filePath`, `path`) and preserve `asVoice` / `audioAsVoice` through Matrix action dispatch so media-only sends and voice-message intents reach the plugin send layer correctly. Thanks @psacc and @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime-api: pin extension runtime-api export surfaces with explicit guardrail coverage so future surface creep becomes a deliberate diff. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/WhatsApp: share split-load singleton state for plugin command registration and active WhatsApp listeners so duplicate module graphs no longer lose native plugin commands or outbound listener state. (#50418) Thanks @huntharo.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: let `openclaw plugins update <npm-spec>` target tracked npm installs by dist-tag or exact version, and preserve the recorded npm spec for later id-based updates. (#49998) Thanks @huntharo.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: share plugin interactive callback routing and plugin bind approval state across duplicate module graphs so Telegram Codex picker buttons and plugin bind approvals no longer fall through to normal inbound message routing. (#50722) Thanks @huntharo.

items.title: 插件/install: bare `openclaw 插件 install <package>` 现在 prefers ClawHub 之前 npm 为了 npm-safe names, 和 only falls back to npm 当 ClawHub does not have that package 或 version. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/ClawHub
items.rawTitle: Plugins/install: bare `openclaw plugins install <package>` now prefers ClawHub before npm for npm-safe names, and only falls back to npm when ClawHub does not have that package or version. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/clawhub

items.title: Skills/image generation: 移除 the bundled `nano-banana-pro` skill wrapper. Use `Agent.defaults.imageGenerationModel.primary: "google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview"` 为了 the native Nano Banana-style 路径 instead.
items.rawTitle: Skills/image generation: remove the bundled `nano-banana-pro` skill wrapper. Use `agents.defaults.imageGenerationModel.primary: "google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview"` for the native Nano Banana-style path instead.

items.title: 插件/SDK: the new public 插件 SDK surface is `openclaw/插件-sdk/*`; `openclaw/extension-API` is removed 使用 no compatibility shim. Bundled 插件 must use injected runtime 为了 host-side operations (为了 example `API.runtime.Agent.runEmbeddedPiAgent`) 和 any remaining direct imports must come 从 narrow `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` subpaths 而不是 the monolithic SDK root. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/插件/sdk-migration 和 https://docs.openclaw.ai/插件/sdk-overview
items.rawTitle: Plugins/SDK: the new public plugin SDK surface is `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*`; `openclaw/extension-api` is removed with no compatibility shim. Bundled plugins must use injected runtime for host-side operations (for example `api.runtime.agent.runEmbeddedPiAgent`) and any remaining direct imports must come from narrow `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` subpaths instead of the monolithic SDK root. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/sdk-migration and https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/sdk-overview

items.title: 配置/env: 移除 legacy `CLAWDBOT_*` 和 `MOLTBOT_*` compatibility env names across runtime, installers, 和 test tooling. Use the matching `OPENCLAW_*` env names instead.
items.rawTitle: Config/env: remove legacy `CLAWDBOT_*` and `MOLTBOT_*` compatibility env names across runtime, installers, and test tooling. Use the matching `OPENCLAW_*` env names instead.

items.title: ClawHub/install: 添加 native `openclaw skills search|install|更新` flows plus `openclaw 插件 install ClawHub:<package>` 使用 tracked 更新 metadata, 网关 skill-install/更新 支持 为了 ClawHub-backed requests, 和 regression coverage/docs 为了 the new source 路径.
items.rawTitle: ClawHub/install: add native `openclaw skills search|install|update` flows plus `openclaw plugins install clawhub:<package>` with tracked update metadata, gateway skill-install/update support for ClawHub-backed requests, and regression coverage/docs for the new source path.

items.title: 插件/bundles: 添加 compatible Codex, Claude, 和 Cursor bundle discovery/install 支持, map bundle skills 进入 OpenClaw skills, 和 apply Claude bundle `settings.json` defaults to embedded Pi 使用 shell overrides sanitized.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/bundles: add compatible Codex, Claude, and Cursor bundle discovery/install support, map bundle skills into OpenClaw skills, and apply Claude bundle `settings.json` defaults to embedded Pi with shell overrides sanitized.

items.title: CLI/hooks: route hook-pack install 和 更新 through `openclaw 插件`, keep `openclaw hooks` focused 在 hook visibility 和 per-hook controls, 和 show 插件-managed hook details 在 CLI output.
items.rawTitle: CLI/hooks: route hook-pack install and update through `openclaw plugins`, keep `openclaw hooks` focused on hook visibility and per-hook controls, and show plugin-managed hook details in CLI output.

items.title: 安全/exec safe bins: 移除 `jq` 从 the default safe-bin allowlist 和 fail closed 在 the `jq` `env` builtin 当 operators explicitly opt `jq` back 在, so `jq -n env` cannot dump host secrets 不适用 an explicit trust 路径. Thanks @gladiator9797 为了 reporting.

Thanks @tdjackey 为了 reporting.

items.title: Agent/steering docs: 更新 embedded Pi steering docs 和 runner comments 为了 the current upstream behavior, where queued steering is injected 之后 the active assistant turn finishes its 工具 calls 而不是 skipping the remaining tools mid-turn. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Web tools/search provider lists: keep onboarding, configure, and docs provider lists alphabetical while preserving the separate runtime auto-detect precedence used for credential-based provider selection.

items.rawTitle: Agents/default timeout: raise the shared default agent timeout from `600s` to `48h` so long-running ACP and agent sessions do not fail unless you configure a shorter limit.

items.title: Agent/inbound: lazy-load media 和 link understanding 为了 plain-text turns 和 cache synced 认证 stores 通过 认证-file state so ordinary inbound replies 避免 unnecessary startup churn. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Agents/inbound: lazy-load media and link understanding for plain-text turns and cache synced auth stores by auth-file state so ordinary inbound replies avoid unnecessary startup churn. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: CLI/配置: make `配置 set --strict-json` enforce real JSON, prefer `JSON.parse` 使用 JSON5 fallback 为了 machine-written cron/subagent stores, 和 relabel raw 配置 surfaces as `JSON/JSON5` to match actual compatibility. Related: #48415, #43127, #14529, #21332. Thanks @adhitShet 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: CLI/config: make `config set --strict-json` enforce real JSON, prefer `JSON.parse` with JSON5 fallback for machine-written cron/subagent stores, and relabel raw config surfaces as `JSON/JSON5` to match actual compatibility. Related: #48415, #43127, #14529, #21332. Thanks @adhitShet and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Webhooks/runtime: move 认证 earlier 和 tighten pre-认证 body limits 和 timeouts across bundled Webhook handlers, including slow-body handling 为了 Mattermost slash commands. (#46802) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 诊断工具/extensions: keep Matrix DM `allowFrom` repairs 在 the canonical `dm.allowFrom` 路径 和 停止 treating Zalouser group sender gating as if it fell back to `allowFrom`, so 诊断工具 warnings 和 `--修复` stay aligned 使用 runtime access control. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/Agent events: 停止 broadcasting false end-的-run `seq gap` errors to clients, 和 isolate node-driven ingress turns 使用 per-turn run IDs so stale tail events cannot leak 进入 later session runs. (#43751) Thanks @caesargattuso.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/agent events: stop broadcasting false end-of-run `seq gap` errors to clients, and isolate node-driven ingress turns with per-turn run IDs so stale tail events cannot leak into later session runs. (#43751) Thanks @caesargattuso.

items.title: 网关/WS handshake: raise the default pre-认证 handshake 超时 to 10 seconds 和 添加 `OPENCLAW_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT_MS` as a runtime override so busy local gateways 停止 dropping healthy CLI connections at 3 seconds. (#49262) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/WS handshake: raise the default pre-auth handshake timeout to 10 seconds and add `OPENCLAW_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT_MS` as a runtime override so busy local gateways stop dropping healthy CLI connections at 3 seconds. (#49262) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

items.title: Agent/bootstrap warnings: move bootstrap truncation warnings out 的 the system prompt 和 进入 the per-turn prompt body so prompt-cache 复用 stays stable 当 truncation warnings appear 或 disappear. (#48753) Thanks @scoootscooob 和 @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Agents/bootstrap warnings: move bootstrap truncation warnings out of the system prompt and into the per-turn prompt body so prompt-cache reuse stays stable when truncation warnings appear or disappear. (#48753) Thanks @scoootscooob and @obviyus.

items.rawTitle: ACP/configured bindings: reinitialize configured ACP sessions that are stuck in `error` state instead of reusing the failed runtime.

items.rawTitle: Agents/prompt composition: append bootstrap truncation warnings to the current-turn prompt and add regression coverage for stable system-prompt cache invariants. (#49237) Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.rawTitle: Agents/session cache: opportunistically sweep expired embedded-runner session cache entries during later cache activity, so one-shot session files do not accumulate forever. (#52427) Thanks @karanuppal.

changes.title: 插件/install: bare `openclaw 插件 install <package>` 现在 prefers ClawHub 之前 npm 为了 npm-safe names, 和 only falls back to npm 当 ClawHub does not have that package 或 version. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/ClawHub
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: bare `openclaw plugins install <package>` now prefers ClawHub before npm for npm-safe names, and only falls back to npm when ClawHub does not have that package or version. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/clawhub

changes.title: 浏览器/Chrome MCP协议: 移除 the legacy Chrome extension relay 路径, bundled extension assets, `driver: "extension"`, 和 `浏览器.relayBindHost`. Run `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` to migrate host-local 浏览器 配置 to `existing-session` / `user`; Docker, headless, sandbox, 和 remote 浏览器 flows still use raw CDP. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/网关/诊断工具 和 https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/浏览器 (#47893) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome MCP: remove the legacy Chrome extension relay path, bundled extension assets, `driver: "extension"`, and `browser.relayBindHost`. Run `openclaw doctor --fix` to migrate host-local browser config to `existing-session` / `user`; Docker, headless, sandbox, and remote browser flows still use raw CDP. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/doctor and https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/browser (#47893) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Tools/image generation: standardize the stock image create/edit 路径 在 the core `image_generate` 工具. The old `nano-banana-pro` docs/examples are gone; if you previously copied that sample-skill 配置, switch to `Agent.defaults.imageGenerationModel` 为了 built-在 image generation 或 install a separate third-party skill explicitly.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/image generation: standardize the stock image create/edit path on the core `image_generate` tool. The old `nano-banana-pro` docs/examples are gone; if you previously copied that sample-skill config, switch to `agents.defaults.imageGenerationModel` for built-in image generation or install a separate third-party skill explicitly.

changes.title: Skills/image generation: 移除 the bundled `nano-banana-pro` skill wrapper. Use `Agent.defaults.imageGenerationModel.primary: "google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview"` 为了 the native Nano Banana-style 路径 instead.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/image generation: remove the bundled `nano-banana-pro` skill wrapper. Use `agents.defaults.imageGenerationModel.primary: "google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview"` for the native Nano Banana-style path instead.

changes.title: 插件/SDK: the new public 插件 SDK surface is `openclaw/插件-sdk/*`; `openclaw/extension-API` is removed 使用 no compatibility shim. Bundled 插件 must use injected runtime 为了 host-side operations (为了 example `API.runtime.Agent.runEmbeddedPiAgent`) 和 any remaining direct imports must come 从 narrow `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` subpaths 而不是 the monolithic SDK root. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/插件/sdk-migration 和 https://docs.openclaw.ai/插件/sdk-overview
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/SDK: the new public plugin SDK surface is `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*`; `openclaw/extension-api` is removed with no compatibility shim. Bundled plugins must use injected runtime for host-side operations (for example `api.runtime.agent.runEmbeddedPiAgent`) and any remaining direct imports must come from narrow `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` subpaths instead of the monolithic SDK root. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/sdk-migration and https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/sdk-overview

changes.title: 插件/message discovery: require `ChannelMessageActionAdapter.describeMessageTool(...)` 为了 shared `message` 工具 discovery. The legacy `listActions`, `getCapabilities`, 和 `getToolSchema` adapter methods are removed. 插件 authors should migrate message discovery to `describeMessageTool(...)` 和 keep channel-specific action runtime code inside the owning 插件 package. Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/message discovery: require `ChannelMessageActionAdapter.describeMessageTool(...)` for shared `message` tool discovery. The legacy `listActions`, `getCapabilities`, and `getToolSchema` adapter methods are removed. Plugin authors should migrate message discovery to `describeMessageTool(...)` and keep channel-specific action runtime code inside the owning plugin package. Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 插件/Matrix: 添加 a new Matrix 插件 backed 通过 the official `matrix-js-sdk`. If you are upgrading 从 the previous public Matrix 插件, follow the migration guide: https://docs.openclaw.ai/install/migrating-matrix Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: add a new Matrix plugin backed by the official `matrix-js-sdk`. If you are upgrading from the previous public Matrix plugin, follow the migration guide: https://docs.openclaw.ai/install/migrating-matrix Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 配置/env: 移除 legacy `CLAWDBOT_*` 和 `MOLTBOT_*` compatibility env names across runtime, installers, 和 test tooling. Use the matching `OPENCLAW_*` env names instead.
changes.rawTitle: Config/env: remove legacy `CLAWDBOT_*` and `MOLTBOT_*` compatibility env names across runtime, installers, and test tooling. Use the matching `OPENCLAW_*` env names instead.

changes.title: 配置/state: 移除 legacy `.moltbot` state-dir 和 `moltbot.json` auto-detection/migration fallback. If you still keep state under `~/.moltbot`, move it to `~/.openclaw` 或 set `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` / `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` explicitly. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/install/migrating 和 https://docs.openclaw.ai/start/getting-started
changes.rawTitle: Config/state: remove legacy `.moltbot` state-dir and `moltbot.json` auto-detection/migration fallback. If you still keep state under `~/.moltbot`, move it to `~/.openclaw` or set `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` / `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` explicitly. changes.title: Exec/env sandbox: block build-工具 JVM injection (`MAVEN_OPTS`, `SBT_OPTS`, `GRADLE_OPTS`, `ANT_OPTS`), glibc tunable exploitation (`GLIBC_TUNABLES`), 和 .NET dependency resolution hijack (`DOTNET_ADDITIONAL_DEPS`) 从 the host exec environment, 和 restrict Gradle init script redirect (`GRADLE_USER_HOME`) as an override-only block so user-configured Gradle homes still propagate. (#49702)
changes.rawTitle: Exec/env sandbox: block build-tool JVM injection (`MAVEN_OPTS`, `SBT_OPTS`, `GRADLE_OPTS`, `ANT_OPTS`), glibc tunable exploitation (`GLIBC_TUNABLES`), and .NET dependency resolution hijack (`DOTNET_ADDITIONAL_DEPS`) from the host exec environment, and restrict Gradle init script redirect (`GRADLE_USER_HOME`) as an override-only block so user-configured Gradle homes still propagate. (#49702)

changes.title: Discord/commands: switch native 命令 deployment to Carbon reconcile 通过 default so Discord restarts 停止 churning slash commands through OpenClaw’s local deploy 路径. (#46597) Thanks @huntharo 和 @thewilloftheshadow.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/commands: switch native command deployment to Carbon reconcile by default so Discord restarts stop churning slash commands through OpenClaw’s local deploy path. (#46597) Thanks @huntharo and @thewilloftheshadow.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: treat `time` as a transparent dispatch wrapper 期间 allowlist evaluation 和 允许-always persistence so approved `time ...` commands bind the inner executable 而不是 the wrapper 路径. Thanks @YLChen-007 为了 reporting.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: treat `time` as a transparent dispatch wrapper during allowlist evaluation and allow-always persistence so approved `time ...` commands bind the inner executable instead of the wrapper path. Thanks @YLChen-007 for reporting.

changes.title: 语音-call/webhooks: reject missing provider signature headers 之前 body reads, drop the pre-认证 body budget to `64 KB` / `5s`, 和 cap concurrent pre-认证 requests per source IP so unauthenticated callers cannot force the old `1 MB` / `30s` buffering 路径. Thanks @SEORY0 为了 reporting.
changes.rawTitle: Voice-call/webhooks: reject missing provider signature headers before body reads, drop the pre-auth body budget to `64 KB` / `5s`, and cap concurrent pre-auth requests per source IP so unauthenticated callers cannot force the old `1 MB` / `30s` buffering path. Thanks @SEORY0 for reporting.

changes.title: 插件/Matrix: 停止 mention-gated 或 otherwise dropped room chatter 从 refreshing focused thread bindings 之前 the message is actually routed, so idle ACP 和 session bindings can still expire normally 在 mention-required rooms. Thanks @vincentkoc, @dinakars777 和 @mvanhorn.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: stop mention-gated or otherwise dropped room chatter from refreshing focused thread bindings before the message is actually routed, so idle ACP and session bindings can still expire normally in mention-required rooms. Thanks @vincentkoc, @dinakars777 and @mvanhorn.

changes.title: 插件/Matrix: durably dedupe inbound room events across 网关 restarts so previously handled Matrix messages are not replayed as new, while preserving clean-restart backlog delivery 为了 unseen events. (#50922) thanks @gumadeiras
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: durably dedupe inbound room events across gateway restarts so previously handled Matrix messages are not replayed as new, while preserving clean-restart backlog delivery for unseen events. (#50922) thanks @gumadeiras

changes.rawTitle: Agents/media replies: migrate the remaining browser, canvas, and nodes snapshot outputs onto `details.media` so generated media keeps attaching to assistant replies after the collect-then-attach refactor. (#51731) Thanks @christianklotz.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/marketplaces: add Claude marketplace registry resolution, `plugin@marketplace` installs, marketplace listing, and update support, plus Docker E2E coverage for local and official marketplace flows. (#48058) Thanks @vincentkoc.
