changes.rawTitle: Commands/plugins: add owner-gated `/plugins` and `/plugin` chat commands for plugin list/show and enable/disable flows, alongside explicit `commands.plugins` config gating. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/bundles: add compatible Codex, Claude, and Cursor bundle discovery/install support, map bundle skills into OpenClaw skills, and apply Claude bundle `settings.json` defaults to embedded Pi with shell overrides sanitized.

Thanks @RacerZ-fighting 为了 reporting.

Thanks @RacerZ-fighting for reporting.

changes.rawTitle: Synology Chat/security: keep reply delivery bound to stable numeric `user_id` by default, and gate mutable username/nickname recipient lookup behind `dangerouslyAllowNameMatching` with new regression coverage. Thanks @nexrin.

changes.rawTitle: Security/pairing: bind iOS setup codes to the intended node profile and reject first-use bootstrap redemption that asks for broader roles or scopes. Thanks @tdjackey.

changes.title: Nostr/安全: enforce inbound DM policy 之前 decrypt, route Nostr DMs through the standard reply pipeline, 和 添加 pre-crypto rate 和 size guards so unknown senders cannot bypass pairing 或 force unbounded crypto work. Thanks @kuranikaran.
changes.rawTitle: Nostr/security: enforce inbound DM policy before decrypt, route Nostr DMs through the standard reply pipeline, and add pre-crypto rate and size guards so unknown senders cannot bypass pairing or force unbounded crypto work. Thanks @kuranikaran.

changes.title: Synology Chat/安全: keep reply delivery bound to stable numeric `user_id` 通过 default, 和 gate mutable username/nickname recipient lookup behind `dangerouslyAllowNameMatching` 使用 new regression coverage. Thanks @nexrin.
changes.rawTitle: Synology Chat/security: keep reply delivery bound to stable numeric `user_id` by default, and gate mutable username/nickname recipient lookup behind `dangerouslyAllowNameMatching` with new regression coverage. Thanks @nexrin.

changes.title: 浏览器/node 代理: enforce `nodeHost.browserProxy.allowProfiles` across `query.profile` 和 `body.profile`, block 代理-side profile create/delete 当 the allowlist is set, 和 keep the default full 代理 surface 当 the allowlist is empty.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/node proxy: enforce `nodeHost.browserProxy.allowProfiles` across `query.profile` and `body.profile`, block proxy-side profile create/delete when the allowlist is set, and keep the default full proxy surface when the allowlist is empty.

changes.title: 安全/device pairing: harden `device.令牌.rotate` deny handling 通过 keeping public failures generic while logging internal deny reasons 和 preserving approved-baseline enforcement. (`GHSA-7jrw-x62h-64p8`)
changes.rawTitle: Security/device pairing: harden `device.token.rotate` deny handling by keeping public failures generic while logging internal deny reasons and preserving approved-baseline enforcement. (`GHSA-7jrw-x62h-64p8`)

changes.title: 安全/exec safe bins: 移除 `jq` 从 the default safe-bin allowlist 和 fail closed 在 the `jq` `env` builtin 当 operators explicitly opt `jq` back 在, so `jq -n env` cannot dump host secrets 不适用 an explicit trust 路径. Thanks @gladiator9797 为了 reporting.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec safe bins: remove `jq` from the default safe-bin allowlist and fail closed on the `jq` `env` builtin when operators explicitly opt `jq` back in, so `jq -n env` cannot dump host secrets without an explicit trust path. Thanks @gladiator9797 for reporting.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: escape blank Hangul filler code points 在 approval prompts across 网关/chat 和 the macOS native approval 界面 so visually empty Unicode padding cannot hide reviewed 命令 text.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: escape blank Hangul filler code points in approval prompts across gateway/chat and the macOS native approval UI so visually empty Unicode padding cannot hide reviewed command text.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: unify transparent dispatch-wrapper handling across resolution 和 允许-always persistence so wrapper metadata cannot 静默地 drift 和 broaden approvals.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: unify transparent dispatch-wrapper handling across resolution and allow-always persistence so wrapper metadata cannot silently drift and broaden approvals.

changes.title: 安全/exec: harden macOS allowlist resolution against wrapper 和 `env` spoofing, require fresh approval 为了 inline interpreter eval 使用 `tools.exec.strictInlineEval`, wrap Discord guild message bodies as untrusted external content, 和 添加 audit findings 为了 risky exec approval 和 open-channel combinations.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec: harden macOS allowlist resolution against wrapper and `env` spoofing, require fresh approval for inline interpreter eval with `tools.exec.strictInlineEval`, wrap Discord guild message bodies as untrusted external content, and add audit findings for risky exec approval and open-channel combinations.

changes.title: 安全/network: harden explicit-代理 SSRF pinning 通过 translating target-hop transport hints onto HTTPS 代理 tunnels 和 failing closed 为了 plain HTTP guarded fetches that cannot 保留 pinned DNS.
changes.rawTitle: Security/network: harden explicit-proxy SSRF pinning by translating target-hop transport hints onto HTTPS proxy tunnels and failing closed for plain HTTP guarded fetches that cannot preserve pinned DNS.

changes.title: 安全/Synology Chat: require explicit per-account Webhook paths 为了 multi-account setups 通过 default, reject duplicate exact Webhook paths fail-closed, 和 keep inherited-路径 behavior behind an explicit dangerous opt-在 so shared routes can no longer collapse DM policy contexts across accounts. Thanks @tdjackey 为了 reporting.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Synology Chat: require explicit per-account webhook paths for multi-account setups by default, reject duplicate exact webhook paths fail-closed, and keep inherited-path behavior behind an explicit dangerous opt-in so shared routes can no longer collapse DM policy contexts across accounts. Thanks @tdjackey for reporting.

changes.title: 浏览器/remote CDP: honor strict 浏览器 SSRF policy 期间 remote CDP reachability 和 `/json/version` discovery checks, redact sensitive `cdpUrl` tokens 从 status output, 和 warn 当 remote CDP targets private/internal hosts.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/remote CDP: honor strict browser SSRF policy during remote CDP reachability and `/json/version` discovery checks, redact sensitive `cdpUrl` tokens from status output, and warn when remote CDP targets private/internal hosts.

changes.title: Media/安全: bound remote-media 错误-body snippets 使用 the same streaming caps 和 idle timeouts as successful downloads, so malicious HTTP 错误 responses cannot force unbounded buffering 之前 OpenClaw throws.
changes.rawTitle: Media/security: bound remote-media error-body snippets with the same streaming caps and idle timeouts as successful downloads, so malicious HTTP error responses cannot force unbounded buffering before OpenClaw throws.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: ignore spoofed loopback hops in trusted forwarding chains and block device approvals that request scopes above the caller session. (#46800) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: clear self-declared scopes for device-less trusted-proxy Control UI sessions so proxy-authenticated connects cannot claim admin or secrets scopes without a bound device identity.

changes.title: Media/Windows 安全: block remote-host `file://` media URLs 和 UNC/network paths 之前 local filesystem resolution 在 core media loading 和 adjacent prompt/sandbox attachment seams, so the next release no longer allows structured local-media inputs to trigger outbound SMB credential handshakes 在 Windows. Thanks @RacerZ-fighting for reporting.

changes.title: CI/onboarding smoke: surface `确保-base-commit` fetch failures as workflow warnings 和 fail the onboarding Docker smoke 当 expected setup prompts drift 而不是 continuing 静默地. Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: CI/onboarding smoke: surface `ensure-base-commit` fetch failures as workflow warnings and fail the onboarding Docker smoke when expected setup prompts drift instead of continuing silently. Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: Z.AI/onboarding: 添加 `glm-5-turbo` to the default Z.AI provider catalog so onboarding-generated configs expose the new 模型 alongside the existing GLM defaults. (#46670) Thanks @tomsun28.
changes.rawTitle: Z.AI/onboarding: add `glm-5-turbo` to the default Z.AI provider catalog so onboarding-generated configs expose the new model alongside the existing GLM defaults. (#46670) Thanks @tomsun28.

changes.title: Zalo Personal/group gating: 停止 reapplying `dmPolicy.allowFrom` as a sender gate 为了 already-allowlisted groups 当 `groupAllowFrom` is unset, so any member 的 an allowed group can trigger replies while DMs stay restricted. (#46663) 修复 #40146. Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Zalo Personal/group gating: stop reapplying `dmPolicy.allowFrom` as a sender gate for already-allowlisted groups when `groupAllowFrom` is unset, so any member of an allowed group can trigger replies while DMs stay restricted. (#46663) Fixes #40146. Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: Zalo/插件 runtime: export `resolveClientIp` 从 `openclaw/插件-sdk/zalo` so installed builds no longer 崩溃 在 startup 当 the Webhook monitor loads 从 the packaged extension 而不是 the monorepo source tree. (#46549) Thanks @No898.
changes.rawTitle: Zalo/plugin runtime: export `resolveClientIp` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/zalo` so installed builds no longer crash on startup when the webhook monitor loads from the packaged extension instead of the monorepo source tree. (#46549) Thanks @No898.

changes.title: Docker/live tests: mount external CLI 认证 homes 进入 writable container copies, derive Codex OAuth认证 expiry 从 JWT `exp`, refresh synced CLI creds 而不是 trusting stale cached expiry, 和 make 网关 live probes wait 在 transcript output so `pnpm test:docker:all` stays green 在 Linux.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/live tests: mount external CLI auth homes into writable container copies, derive Codex OAuth expiry from JWT `exp`, refresh synced CLI creds instead of trusting stale cached expiry, and make gateway live probes wait on transcript output so `pnpm test:docker:all` stays green in Linux.

changes.title: 网关/watch mode: restart 在 bundled-插件 package 和 manifest metadata changes, rebuild `dist` 为了 extension source 和 `tsdown.配置.ts` changes, 和 still ignore extension docs. (#47571) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/watch mode: restart on bundled-plugin package and manifest metadata changes, rebuild `dist` for extension source and `tsdown.config.ts` changes, and still ignore extension docs. (#47571) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 网关/watch mode: recreate bundled 插件 runtime metadata 之后 clean 或 stale `dist` states, so `pnpm 网关:watch` no longer fails 在 missing `dist/extensions/*/openclaw.插件.json` manifests 之后 a rebuild. Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/watch mode: recreate bundled plugin runtime metadata after clean or stale `dist` states, so `pnpm gateway:watch` no longer fails on missing `dist/extensions/*/openclaw.plugin.json` manifests after a rebuild. Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Control 界面: scope persisted session selection per 网关, 防止 stale session bleed across tokenized 网关 opens, 和 cap stored 网关 session history. (#47453) Thanks @sallyom.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: scope persisted session selection per gateway, prevent stale session bleed across tokenized gateway opens, and cap stored gateway session history. (#47453) Thanks @sallyom.

changes.title: 模型/OpenAI Codex OAuth认证: start the remote manual-input race 为了 Codex login 和 keep the pasted-input prompt aligned 使用 the actual accepted values, so remote/VPS 认证 no longer stalls waiting 在 an unreachable localhost callback. (#51631) Thanks @cash-echo-bot.
changes.rawTitle: Models/OpenAI Codex OAuth: start the remote manual-input race for Codex login and keep the pasted-input prompt aligned with the actual accepted values, so remote/VPS auth no longer stalls waiting on an unreachable localhost callback. (#51631) Thanks @cash-echo-bot.

changes.title: Group mention gating: reject invalid 和 unsafe nested-repetition `mentionPatterns`, 复用 the shared safe 配置-regex compiler across mention stripping 和 detection, 和 cache strip-time regex compilation so noisy groups 避免 repeated recompiles.
changes.rawTitle: Group mention gating: reject invalid and unsafe nested-repetition `mentionPatterns`, reuse the shared safe config-regex compiler across mention stripping and detection, and cache strip-time regex compilation so noisy groups avoid repeated recompiles.

changes.title: 浏览器/profiles: drop the auto-created `Chrome-relay` 浏览器 profile; users who need the Chrome extension relay must 现在 create their own profile via `openclaw 浏览器 create-profile`. (#46596) 修复 #45777. Thanks @odysseus0.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/profiles: drop the auto-created `chrome-relay` browser profile; users who need the Chrome extension relay must now create their own profile via `openclaw browser create-profile`. (#46596) Fixes #45777. Thanks @odysseus0.

changes.title: CI/channel test routing: move the built-在 channel suites 进入 `test:channels` 和 keep them out 的 `test:extensions`, so extension CI no longer fails 之后 the channel migration while targeted test routing still sends Slack, Signal, 和 iMessage suites to the right lane. (#46066) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: CI/channel test routing: move the built-in channel suites into `test:channels` and keep them out of `test:extensions`, so extension CI no longer fails after the channel migration while targeted test routing still sends Slack, Signal, and iMessage suites to the right lane. (#46066) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 网关/配置 validation: 停止 treating the implicit default 内存 slot as a required explicit 插件 配置, so startup no longer fails 使用 `插件.slots.内存: 插件 not found: 内存-core` 当 `内存-core` was only inferred. (#47494) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/config validation: stop treating the implicit default memory slot as a required explicit plugin config, so startup no longer fails with `plugins.slots.memory: plugin not found: memory-core` when `memory-core` was only inferred. (#47494) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: Tlon: honor explicit empty allowlists 和 defer cite expansion. (#46788) Thanks @zpbrent 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tlon: honor explicit empty allowlists and defer cite expansion. (#46788) Thanks @zpbrent and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Tlon/DM 认证: defer cited-message expansion until 之后 DM authorization 和 owner 命令 handling, so unauthorized DMs 和 owner approval/admin commands no longer trigger cross-channel cite fetches 之前 the deny 或 命令 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Tlon/DM auth: defer cited-message expansion until after DM authorization and owner command handling, so unauthorized DMs and owner approval/admin commands no longer trigger cross-channel cite fetches before the deny or command path.

changes.title: 网关/Agent events: 停止 broadcasting false end-的-run `seq gap` errors to clients, 和 isolate node-driven ingress turns 使用 per-turn run IDs so stale tail events cannot leak 进入 later session runs. (#43751) Thanks @caesargattuso.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/agent events: stop broadcasting false end-of-run `seq gap` errors to clients, and isolate node-driven ingress turns with per-turn run IDs so stale tail events cannot leak into later session runs. (#43751) Thanks @caesargattuso.

changes.title: Nodes/pending actions: re-check queued foreground actions against the current node 命令 policy 之前 returning them to the node. (#46815) Thanks @zpbrent 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Nodes/pending actions: re-check queued foreground actions against the current node command policy before returning them to the node. (#46815) Thanks @zpbrent and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Windows/网关 status: accept `schtasks` `Last Result` output as an alias 为了 `Last Run Result`, so running scheduled-task installs no longer show `Runtime: unknown`. (#47844) Thanks @MoerAI.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/gateway status: accept `schtasks` `Last Result` output as an alias for `Last Run Result`, so running scheduled-task installs no longer show `Runtime: unknown`. (#47844) Thanks @MoerAI.

changes.title: ACP/acpx: 解决 the bundled 插件 root 从 the actual 插件 directory so 插件-local installs stay under `dist/extensions/acpx` 而不是 escaping to `dist/extensions` 和 failing runtime setup. (#47601) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/acpx: resolve the bundled plugin root from the actual plugin directory so plugin-local installs stay under `dist/extensions/acpx` instead of escaping to `dist/extensions` and failing runtime setup. (#47601) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: 网关/WS handshake: raise the default pre-认证 handshake 超时 to 10 seconds 和 添加 `OPENCLAW_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT_MS` as a runtime override so busy local gateways 停止 dropping healthy CLI connections at 3 seconds. (#49262) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/WS handshake: raise the default pre-auth handshake timeout to 10 seconds and add `OPENCLAW_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT_MS` as a runtime override so busy local gateways stop dropping healthy CLI connections at 3 seconds. (#49262) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

changes.title: 网关/websocket pairing bypass 为了 disabled 认证: skip device-pairing enforcement 为了 Control 界面 operator sessions 当 `网关.认证.mode=none`, so reverse-proxied dashboards no longer get stuck 在 `pairing required` despite 认证 being explicitly disabled. (#47148) Thanks @ademczuk.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/websocket pairing bypass for disabled auth: skip device-pairing enforcement for Control UI operator sessions when `gateway.auth.mode=none`, so reverse-proxied dashboards no longer get stuck on `pairing required` despite auth being explicitly disabled. (#47148) Thanks @ademczuk.

changes.title: Agent/usage tracking: 停止 forcing `supportsUsageInStreaming: false` 在 non-native OpenAI-completions providers so compatible backends report 令牌 usage 和 cost 重新 而不是 showing all zeros. (#46500) 修复 #46142. Thanks @ademczuk.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/usage tracking: stop forcing `supportsUsageInStreaming: false` on non-native OpenAI-completions providers so compatible backends report token usage and cost again instead of showing all zeros. (#46500) Fixes #46142. Thanks @ademczuk.

changes.title: ACP/acpx: keep 插件-local backend installs under `extensions/acpx` 在 live repo checkouts so rebuilds no longer delete the runtime binary, 和 避免 package-lock churn 期间 runtime repair.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/acpx: keep plugin-local backend installs under `extensions/acpx` in live repo checkouts so rebuilds no longer delete the runtime binary, and avoid package-lock churn during runtime repair.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: rerun transcript repair 之后 `session.compact()` so orphaned `tool_result` blocks cannot survive compaction 和 break later Anthropic requests. (#16095) thanks @claw-sylphx.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: rerun transcript repair after `session.compact()` so orphaned `tool_result` blocks cannot survive compaction and break later Anthropic requests. (#16095) thanks @claw-sylphx.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: trigger overflow recovery 从 the 工具-result guard once post-compaction context still exceeds the safe threshold, so long 工具 loops compact 之前 the next 模型 call hard-fails. (#29371) thanks @keshav55.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: trigger overflow recovery from the tool-result guard once post-compaction context still exceeds the safe threshold, so long tool loops compact before the next model call hard-fails. (#29371) thanks @keshav55.

changes.title: macOS/exec approvals: harden exec-host request HMAC verification to use a timing-safe compare 和 keep malformed 或 truncated signatures fail-closed 在 focused IPC 认证 coverage.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/exec approvals: harden exec-host request HMAC verification to use a timing-safe compare and keep malformed or truncated signatures fail-closed in focused IPC auth coverage.

changes.title: 网关/exec approvals: surface requested env override keys 在 网关-host approval prompts so operators can review surviving env context 不适用 inheriting noisy base host env.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/exec approvals: surface requested env override keys in gateway-host approval prompts so operators can review surviving env context without inheriting noisy base host env.

changes.title: Telegram/network: 保留 sticky IPv4 fallback state across polling restarts so hosts 使用 unstable IPv6 to `API.Telegram.org` 停止 re-triggering repeated Telegram timeouts 之后 each restart. (#48282) Thanks @yassinebkr.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/network: preserve sticky IPv4 fallback state across polling restarts so hosts with unstable IPv6 to `api.telegram.org` stop re-triggering repeated Telegram timeouts after each restart. (#48282) Thanks @yassinebkr.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: write minimal boundary summaries 为了 empty preparations while keeping split-turn prefixes 在 the normal 路径, so no-summarizable-message sessions 停止 retriggering the safeguard loop. (#42215) thanks @lml2468.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: write minimal boundary summaries for empty preparations while keeping split-turn prefixes on the normal path, so no-summarizable-message sessions stop retriggering the safeguard loop. (#42215) thanks @lml2468.

changes.title: 模型/chat commands: keep `/模型 ...@YYYYMMDD` version suffixes intact 通过 default, 但是 still honor matching stored numeric 认证-profile overrides 为了 the same provider. (#48896) Thanks @Alix-007.
changes.rawTitle: Models/chat commands: keep `/model ...@YYYYMMDD` version suffixes intact by default, but still honor matching stored numeric auth-profile overrides for the same provider. (#48896) Thanks @Alix-007.

changes.title: 网关/channels: serialize per-account channel startup so overlapping starts do not boot the same provider twice, preventing MS Teams `EADDRINUSE` 崩溃 loops 期间 startup 和 restart. (#49583) Thanks @sudie-codes.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/channels: serialize per-account channel startup so overlapping starts do not boot the same provider twice, preventing MS Teams `EADDRINUSE` crash loops during startup and restart. (#49583) Thanks @sudie-codes.

changes.rawTitle: Discord: enforce strict DM component allowlist auth (#49997) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.rawTitle: Stabilize plugin loader and Docker extension smoke (#50058) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Telegram: stabilize pairing/session/forum routing 和 reply formatting tests (#50155) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: stabilize pairing/session/forum routing and reply formatting tests (#50155) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping (#50782) Thanks @YLChen-007 and @joshavant.

changes.rawTitle: LINE: harden Express webhook parsing to verified raw body (#51202) Thanks @gladiator9797 and @joshavant.

changes.title: Exec: harden host env override handling across 网关 和 node (#51207) Thanks @gladiator9797 和 @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Exec: harden host env override handling across gateway and node (#51207) Thanks @gladiator9797 and @joshavant.

changes.title: 语音 Call: enforce spoken-output contract 和 修复 stream TTS silence regression (#51500) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Voice Call: enforce spoken-output contract and fix stream TTS silence regression (#51500) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: xAI/模型: rename the bundled Grok 4.20 catalog entries to the GA IDs 和 normalize saved deprecated beta IDs at runtime so existing configs 和 sessions keep resolving. (#50772) thanks @Jaaneek
changes.rawTitle: xAI/models: rename the bundled Grok 4.20 catalog entries to the GA IDs and normalize saved deprecated beta IDs at runtime so existing configs and sessions keep resolving. (#50772) thanks @Jaaneek

changes.title: Agent/bootstrap warnings: move bootstrap truncation warnings out 的 the system prompt 和 进入 the per-turn prompt body so prompt-cache 复用 stays stable 当 truncation warnings appear 或 disappear. (#48753) Thanks @scoootscooob 和 @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/bootstrap warnings: move bootstrap truncation warnings out of the system prompt and into the per-turn prompt body so prompt-cache reuse stays stable when truncation warnings appear or disappear. (#48753) Thanks @scoootscooob and @obviyus.

changes.title: Telegram/DM topic session keys: route named-account DM topics through the same per-account base session 密钥 across inbound messages, native commands, 和 session-state lookups so `/status` 和 thread recovery 停止 creating phantom `Agent:main:main:thread:...` sessions. (#48204) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/DM topic session keys: route named-account DM topics through the same per-account base session key across inbound messages, native commands, and session-state lookups so `/status` and thread recovery stop creating phantom `agent:main:main:thread:...` sessions. (#48204) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: ACP/configured bindings: reinitialize configured ACP sessions that are stuck 在 `错误` state 而不是 reusing the failed runtime.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/configured bindings: reinitialize configured ACP sessions that are stuck in `error` state instead of reusing the failed runtime.

changes.title: Telegram/network: unify API 和 media fetches under the same sticky IPv4 和 pinned-IP fallback chain, 和 re-validate pinned override addresses against SSRF policy. (#49148) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/network: unify API and media fetches under the same sticky IPv4 and pinned-IP fallback chain, and re-validate pinned override addresses against SSRF policy. (#49148) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Agent/prompt composition: append bootstrap truncation warnings to the current-turn prompt 和 添加 regression coverage 为了 stable system-prompt cache invariants. (#49237) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/prompt composition: append bootstrap truncation warnings to the current-turn prompt and add regression coverage for stable system-prompt cache invariants. (#49237) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: Synology Chat/multi-account: scope direct-message sessions 通过 account 和 sender so identical Webhook `user_id` values 在 different Synology accounts no longer share transcript 或 delivery state.
changes.rawTitle: Synology Chat/multi-account: scope direct-message sessions by account and sender so identical webhook `user_id` values on different Synology accounts no longer share transcript or delivery state.

changes.title: Telegram/安全: 添加 regression coverage proving pinned fallback host overrides stay bound to Telegram 和 delegate non-matching hostnames back to the original lookup 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/security: add regression coverage proving pinned fallback host overrides stay bound to Telegram and delegate non-matching hostnames back to the original lookup path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Tools/image generation: 添加 bundled fal image generation 支持 so `image_generate` can target `fal/*` 模型 使用 `FAL_KEY`, including single-image edit flows via FLUX image-to-image. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/image generation: add bundled fal image generation support so `image_generate` can target `fal/*` models with `FAL_KEY`, including single-image edit flows via FLUX image-to-image. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/hooks: 保留 immutable hook ingress provenance across async isolated-Agent dispatch so normalized hook session routes keep external wrapping, Gmail-specific policy, 和 Gmail 模型 selection intact.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/hooks: preserve immutable hook ingress provenance across async isolated-agent dispatch so normalized hook session routes keep external wrapping, Gmail-specific policy, and Gmail model selection intact.

changes.title: Messages/polls: treat zero-valued poll params 在 `message.send` as unset defaults while keeping non-zero poll params 在 the poll validation 路径. (#52150) 修复 #52118. Thanks @Bartok9.
changes.rawTitle: Messages/polls: treat zero-valued poll params on `message.send` as unset defaults while keeping non-zero poll params on the poll validation path. (#52150) Fixes #52118. Thanks @Bartok9.

changes.rawTitle: xAI/web search: add missing Grok credential metadata so the bundled provider registration type-checks again. (#49472) thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: Agent/session cache: opportunistically sweep expired embedded-runner session cache entries 期间 later cache activity, so one-shot session files do not accumulate forever. (#52427) Thanks @karanuppal.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/session cache: opportunistically sweep expired embedded-runner session cache entries during later cache activity, so one-shot session files do not accumulate forever. (#52427) Thanks @karanuppal.

changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: stabilize inbound monitor and setup tests (#50007) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Matrix: make onboarding status runtime-safe (#49995) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix: make onboarding status runtime-safe (#49995) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Channels: stabilize lane harness 和 monitor tests (#50167) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Channels: stabilize lane harness and monitor tests (#50167) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: 添加 an opt-在 post-compaction session JSONL truncation step that drops summarized transcript entries while preserving the retained branch tail 和 live session metadata. (#41021) thanks @thirumaleshp.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: add an opt-in post-compaction session JSONL truncation step that drops summarized transcript entries while preserving the retained branch tail and live session metadata. (#41021) thanks @thirumaleshp.

changes.title: Telegram/routing: fail loud 当 `message send` targets an unknown non-default Telegram `accountId`, 而不是 静默地 falling back to the channel-level bot 令牌 和 sending through the wrong bot. (#50853) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/routing: fail loud when `message send` targets an unknown non-default Telegram `accountId`, instead of silently falling back to the channel-level bot token and sending through the wrong bot. (#50853) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Web search: align onboarding, configure, 和 finalize 使用 插件-owned provider contracts, including disabled-provider recovery, 配置-aware credential hooks, 和 runtime-visible summaries. (#50935) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Web search: align onboarding, configure, and finalize with plugin-owned provider contracts, including disabled-provider recovery, config-aware credential hooks, and runtime-visible summaries. (#50935) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Agent/replay: sanitize malformed assistant 工具-call replay blocks 之前 provider replay so follow-up Anthropic requests do not inherit the downstream `replace` 崩溃. (#50005) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replay: sanitize malformed assistant tool-call replay blocks before provider replay so follow-up Anthropic requests do not inherit the downstream `replace` crash. (#50005) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: Discord/startup logging: report client initialization while the 网关 is still connecting 而不是 claiming Discord is logged 在 之前 readiness is reached. (#51425) Thanks @scoootscoob.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/startup logging: report client initialization while the gateway is still connecting instead of claiming Discord is logged in before readiness is reached. (#51425) Thanks @scoootscoob.

changes.title: Agent/compaction safeguard: 保留 split-turn context 和 preserved recent turns 当 capped 重试 fallback reuses the last successful summary. (#27727) thanks @Pandadadadazxf.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction safeguard: preserve split-turn context and preserved recent turns when capped retry fallback reuses the last successful summary. (#27727) thanks @Pandadadadazxf.

changes.title: Agent/内存 flush: keep transcript-hash dedup active across 内存-flush fallback retries so a write-then-throw flush attempt cannot append duplicate `内存.md` entries 之前 the fallback cycle completes. (#34222) Thanks @lml2468.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/memory flush: keep transcript-hash dedup active across memory-flush fallback retries so a write-then-throw flush attempt cannot append duplicate `MEMORY.md` entries before the fallback cycle completes. (#34222) Thanks @lml2468.

changes.title: Discord/ACP: forward worker abort signals 进入 ACP turns so timed-out Discord jobs cancel the running turn 而不是 静默地 leaving the bound ACP session working 在 the background.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/ACP: forward worker abort signals into ACP turns so timed-out Discord jobs cancel the running turn instead of silently leaving the bound ACP session working in the background.

changes.rawTitle: ACP/Codex session replay: preserve hidden assistant thinking when loading or rebinding existing ACP sessions so stored thought chunks do not replay into visible assistant text. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/commands: keep internal `chat.send` slash-命令 UX while requiring `operator.admin` 之前 internal callers can persist `/exec` defaults 或 mutate `phone-control` node policy through `/phone arm|disarm`.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/commands: keep internal `chat.send` slash-command UX while requiring `operator.admin` before internal callers can persist `/exec` defaults or mutate `phone-control` node policy through `/phone arm|disarm`.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: move bundled plugin `KeyedAsyncQueue` imports onto the stable `plugin-sdk/core` surface so Matrix Docker/runtime builds do not depend on the brittle keyed-async-queue subpath. Thanks @ecohash-co and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/context engines: enforce owner-aware context-engine registration 在 both loader 和 public SDK paths so 插件 cannot spoof privileged ownership, claim the core `legacy` engine id, 或 overwrite an existing engine id through direct SDK imports. (#47595) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/context engines: enforce owner-aware context-engine registration on both loader and public SDK paths so plugins cannot spoof privileged ownership, claim the core `legacy` engine id, or overwrite an existing engine id through direct SDK imports. (#47595) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/bundler TDZ: 修复 `RESERVED_COMMANDS` temporal dead zone 错误 that prevented device-pair, phone-control, 和 talk-语音 插件 从 registering 当 the bundler placed the commands module 之后 call sites 在 the same output chunk. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/bundler TDZ: fix `RESERVED_COMMANDS` temporal dead zone error that prevented device-pair, phone-control, and talk-voice plugins from registering when the bundler placed the commands module after call sites in the same output chunk. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 插件/imports: 修复 stale googlechat runtime-API import paths 和 Signal SDK circular re-exports broken 通过 recent 插件-sdk refactors. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/imports: fix stale googlechat runtime-api import paths and signal SDK circular re-exports broken by recent plugin-sdk refactors. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 插件/install precedence: keep bundled 插件 ahead 的 auto-discovered globals 通过 default, 但是 let an explicitly installed 插件 record win its own duplicate-id tie so installed channel 插件 load 从 `~/.openclaw/extensions` 之后 `openclaw 插件 install`. (#46722) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install precedence: keep bundled plugins ahead of auto-discovered globals by default, but let an explicitly installed plugin record win its own duplicate-id tie so installed channel plugins load from `~/.openclaw/extensions` after `openclaw plugins install`. items.title: 插件/SDK: the new public 插件 SDK surface is `openclaw/插件-sdk/*`; `openclaw/extension-API` is removed 使用 no compatibility shim. Bundled 插件 must use injected runtime 为了 host-side operations (为了 example `API.runtime.Agent.runEmbeddedPiAgent`) 和 any remaining direct imports must come 从 narrow `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` subpaths 而不是 the monolithic SDK root. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/插件/sdk-migration 和 https://docs.openclaw.ai/插件/sdk-overview
items.rawTitle: Plugins/SDK: the new public plugin SDK surface is `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*`; `openclaw/extension-api` is removed with no compatibility shim. Bundled plugins must use injected runtime for host-side operations (for example `api.runtime.agent.runEmbeddedPiAgent`) and any remaining direct imports must come from narrow `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` subpaths instead of the monolithic SDK root. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/sdk-migration and https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/sdk-overview

items.title: Android/camera: recycle intermediate 和 final snap bitmaps 在 `camera.snap` so repeated captures do not leak native image 内存. (#41902) Thanks @Kaneki-x.
items.rawTitle: Android/camera: recycle intermediate and final snap bitmaps in `camera.snap` so repeated captures do not leak native image memory. (#41902) Thanks @Kaneki-x.

items.title: Android/canvas: recycle captured 和 scaled snapshot bitmaps so repeated canvas snapshots do not leak native image 内存. (#41889) Thanks @Kaneki-x.
items.rawTitle: Android/canvas: recycle captured and scaled snapshot bitmaps so repeated canvas snapshots do not leak native image memory. (#41889) Thanks @Kaneki-x.

items.title: 内存/core tools: register `memory_search` 和 `memory_get` independently so one unavailable 内存 工具 no longer suppresses the other 在 new sessions. (#50198) Thanks @artwalker.
items.rawTitle: Memory/core tools: register `memory_search` and `memory_get` independently so one unavailable memory tool no longer suppresses the other in new sessions. (#50198) Thanks @artwalker.

items.title: Node/startup: 移除 leftover debug `console.log("node host 路径: ...")` that printed the resolved 路径 在 every `openclaw node run` invocation. (#46515) 修复 #46411. Thanks @ademczuk.
items.rawTitle: Node/startup: remove leftover debug `console.log("node host PATH: ...")` that printed the resolved PATH on every `openclaw node run` invocation. (#46515) Fixes #46411. Thanks @ademczuk.

items.title: CLI/completion: reduce recursive completion-script string churn 和 修复 nested PowerShell 命令-路径 matching so generated nested completions 解决 在 PowerShell too. (#45537) Thanks @yiShanXin 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: CLI/completion: reduce recursive completion-script string churn and fix nested PowerShell command-path matching so generated nested completions resolve on PowerShell too. (#45537) Thanks @yiShanXin and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Hardening: refresh stale device pairing requests 和 pending metadata (#50695) Thanks @smaeljaish771 和 @joshavant.
items.rawTitle: Hardening: refresh stale device pairing requests and pending metadata (#50695) Thanks @smaeljaish771 and @joshavant.

items.title: Email/Webhook wrapping: sanitize sender 和 subject metadata 之前 external-content wrapping so metadata fields cannot break the wrapper structure. (#46816) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Email/webhook wrapping: sanitize sender and subject metadata before external-content wrapping so metadata fields cannot break the wrapper structure. (#46816) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Zalo Personal/group gating: 停止 reapplying `dmPolicy.allowFrom` as a sender gate 为了 already-allowlisted groups 当 `groupAllowFrom` is unset, so any member 的 an allowed group can trigger replies while DMs stay restricted. (#46663) 修复 #40146. Thanks @Takhoffman.
items.rawTitle: Zalo Personal/group gating: stop reapplying `dmPolicy.allowFrom` as a sender gate for already-allowlisted groups when `groupAllowFrom` is unset, so any member of an allowed group can trigger replies while DMs stay restricted. (#46663) Fixes #40146. Thanks @Takhoffman.

items.title: macOS/exec approvals: harden exec-host request HMAC verification to use a timing-safe compare 和 keep malformed 或 truncated signatures fail-closed 在 focused IPC 认证 coverage.
items.rawTitle: macOS/exec approvals: harden exec-host request HMAC verification to use a timing-safe compare and keep malformed or truncated signatures fail-closed in focused IPC auth coverage.

items.title: LINE: harden Express Webhook parsing to verified raw body (#51202) Thanks @gladiator9797 和 @joshavant.
items.rawTitle: LINE: harden Express webhook parsing to verified raw body (#51202) Thanks @gladiator9797 and @joshavant.

changes.title: Android/chat settings: redesign the chat settings sheet 使用 grouped device 和 media sections, refresh the Connect 和 语音 tabs, 和 tighten the chat composer/session header 为了 a denser mobile layout. (#44894) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Android/chat settings: redesign the chat settings sheet with grouped device and media sections, refresh the Connect and Voice tabs, and tighten the chat composer/session header for a denser mobile layout. (#44894) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: iOS/onboarding: 添加 a first-run welcome pager 之前 网关 setup, 停止 auto-opening the QR scanner, 和 show `/pair qr` instructions 在 the connect step. (#45054) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: iOS/onboarding: add a first-run welcome pager before gateway setup, stop auto-opening the QR scanner, and show `/pair qr` instructions on the connect step. (#45054) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: 浏览器/existing-session: 添加 an official Chrome DevTools MCP协议 attach mode 为了 signed-在 live Chrome sessions, 使用 docs 为了 `Chrome://inspect/#remote-debugging` enablement 和 direct backlinks to Chrome’s own setup guides.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/existing-session: add an official Chrome DevTools MCP attach mode for signed-in live Chrome sessions, with docs for `chrome://inspect/#remote-debugging` enablement and direct backlinks to Chrome’s own setup guides.

changes.title: 浏览器/Agent: 添加 built-在 `profile="user"` 为了 the logged-在 host 浏览器 和 `profile="Chrome-relay"` 为了 the extension relay, so Agent 浏览器 calls can prefer the real signed-在 浏览器 不适用 the extra `browserSession` selector.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/agents: add built-in `profile="user"` for the logged-in host browser and `profile="chrome-relay"` for the extension relay, so agent browser calls can prefer the real signed-in browser without the extra `browserSession` selector.

changes.title: 浏览器/act automation: 添加 batched actions, selector targeting, 和 delayed clicks 为了 浏览器 act requests 使用 normalized batch dispatch. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/act automation: add batched actions, selector targeting, and delayed clicks for browser act requests with normalized batch dispatch. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Docker/timezone override: 添加 `OPENCLAW_TZ` so `docker-setup.sh` can pin 网关 和 CLI containers to a chosen IANA timezone 而不是 inheriting the daemon default. (#34119) Thanks @Lanfei.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/timezone override: add `OPENCLAW_TZ` so `docker-setup.sh` can pin gateway and CLI containers to a chosen IANA timezone instead of inheriting the daemon default. (#34119) Thanks @Lanfei.

changes.title: Dependencies/pi: bump `@mariozechner/pi-Agent-core`, `@mariozechner/pi-ai`, `@mariozechner/pi-coding-Agent`, 和 `@mariozechner/pi-tui` to `0.58.0`.
changes.rawTitle: Dependencies/pi: bump `@mariozechner/pi-agent-core`, `@mariozechner/pi-ai`, `@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent`, and `@mariozechner/pi-tui` to `0.58.0`.

changes.title: Dashboard/chat 界面: 停止 reloading full chat history 在 every live 工具 result 在 dashboard v2 so 工具-heavy runs no longer trigger 界面 freeze/re-render storms while the final event still refreshes persisted history. (#45541) Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Dashboard/chat UI: stop reloading full chat history on every live tool result in dashboard v2 so tool-heavy runs no longer trigger UI freeze/re-render storms while the final event still refreshes persisted history. (#45541) Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Ollama/reasoning visibility: 停止 promoting native `thinking` 和 `reasoning` fields 进入 final assistant text so local reasoning 模型 no longer leak internal thoughts 在 normal replies. (#45330) Thanks @xi7ang.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama/reasoning visibility: stop promoting native `thinking` and `reasoning` fields into final assistant text so local reasoning models no longer leak internal thoughts in normal replies. (#45330) Thanks @xi7ang.

changes.title: Android/onboarding QR scan: switch setup QR scanning to Google Code Scanner so onboarding uses a more reliable scanner 而不是 the legacy embedded ZXing flow. (#45021) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Android/onboarding QR scan: switch setup QR scanning to Google Code Scanner so onboarding uses a more reliable scanner instead of the legacy embedded ZXing flow. (#45021) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 浏览器/existing-session: harden driver validation 和 session lifecycle so transport errors trigger reconnects while 工具-level errors 保留 the session, 和 extract shared ARIA role sets to deduplicate Playwright 和 Chrome MCP协议 snapshot paths. (#45682) Thanks @odysseus0.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/existing-session: harden driver validation and session lifecycle so transport errors trigger reconnects while tool-level errors preserve the session, and extract shared ARIA role sets to deduplicate Playwright and Chrome MCP snapshot paths. (#45682) Thanks @odysseus0.

changes.title: 浏览器/existing-session: accept text-only `list_pages` 和 `new_page` responses 从 Chrome DevTools MCP协议 so live-session tab discovery 和 new-tab open flows keep working 当 the server omits structured page metadata.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/existing-session: accept text-only `list_pages` and `new_page` responses from Chrome DevTools MCP so live-session tab discovery and new-tab open flows keep working when the server omits structured page metadata.

changes.title: Control 界面/insecure 认证: 保留 explicit shared 令牌 和 password 认证 在 plain-HTTP Control 界面 connects so LAN 和 reverse-代理 sessions no longer drop shared 认证 之前 the first WebSocket handshake. (#45088) Thanks @velvet-shark.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/insecure auth: preserve explicit shared token and password auth on plain-HTTP Control UI connects so LAN and reverse-proxy sessions no longer drop shared auth before the first WebSocket handshake. (#45088) Thanks @velvet-shark.

changes.title: 网关/session reset: 保留 `lastAccountId` 和 `lastThreadId` across 网关 session resets so replies keep routing back to the same account 和 thread 之后 `/reset`. (#44773) Thanks @Lanfei.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/session reset: preserve `lastAccountId` and `lastThreadId` across gateway session resets so replies keep routing back to the same account and thread after `/reset`. (#44773) Thanks @Lanfei.

changes.title: macOS/onboarding: 避免 self-restarting freshly bootstrapped launchd gateways 和 give new daemon installs longer to become healthy, so `openclaw onboard --install-daemon` no longer false-fails 在 slower Macs 和 fresh VM snapshots.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/onboarding: avoid self-restarting freshly bootstrapped launchd gateways and give new daemon installs longer to become healthy, so `openclaw onboard --install-daemon` no longer false-fails on slower Macs and fresh VM snapshots.

changes.title: 网关/status: 添加 `openclaw 网关 status --require-rpc` 和 clearer Linux non-interactive daemon-install failure reporting so automation can fail hard 在 probe misses 而不是 treating a printed RPC 错误 as green.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/status: add `openclaw gateway status --require-rpc` and clearer Linux non-interactive daemon-install failure reporting so automation can fail hard on probe misses instead of treating a printed RPC error as green.

changes.title: macOS/exec approvals: respect per-Agent exec approval settings 在 the 网关 prompter, including allowlist fallback 当 the native prompt cannot be shown, so 网关-triggered `system.run` requests follow configured policy 而不是 always prompting 或 denying unexpectedly. (#13707) Thanks @sliekens.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/exec approvals: respect per-agent exec approval settings in the gateway prompter, including allowlist fallback when the native prompt cannot be shown, so gateway-triggered `system.run` requests follow configured policy instead of always prompting or denying unexpectedly. (#13707) Thanks @sliekens.

changes.title: Telegram/media downloads: thread the same direct 或 代理 transport policy 进入 SSRF-guarded file fetches so inbound attachments keep working 当 Telegram falls back 之间 env-代理 和 direct networking. (#44639) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/media downloads: thread the same direct or proxy transport policy into SSRF-guarded file fetches so inbound attachments keep working when Telegram falls back between env-proxy and direct networking. (#44639) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Telegram/inbound media IPv4 fallback: 重试 SSRF-guarded Telegram file downloads once 使用 the same IPv4 fallback policy as Bot API calls so fresh installs 在 IPv6-broken hosts no longer fail to download inbound images.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/inbound media IPv4 fallback: retry SSRF-guarded Telegram file downloads once with the same IPv4 fallback policy as Bot API calls so fresh installs on IPv6-broken hosts no longer fail to download inbound images.

changes.title: Windows/网关 install: bound `schtasks` calls 和 fall back to the Startup-folder login item 当 task creation hangs, so native `openclaw 网关 install` fails fast 而不是 wedging forever 在 broken Scheduled Task setups.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/gateway install: bound `schtasks` calls and fall back to the Startup-folder login item when task creation hangs, so native `openclaw gateway install` fails fast instead of wedging forever on broken Scheduled Task setups.

changes.title: Windows/网关 停止: 解决 Startup-folder fallback listeners 从 the installed `网关.cmd` port, so `openclaw 网关 停止` 现在 actually kills fallback-launched 网关 processes 之前 restart.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/gateway stop: resolve Startup-folder fallback listeners from the installed `gateway.cmd` port, so `openclaw gateway stop` now actually kills fallback-launched gateway processes before restart.

changes.title: Windows/网关 status: 复用 the installed service 命令 environment 当 reading runtime status, so startup-fallback gateways keep reporting the configured port 和 running state 在 `网关 status --json` 而不是 falling back to `网关 port unknown`.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/gateway status: reuse the installed service command environment when reading runtime status, so startup-fallback gateways keep reporting the configured port and running state in `gateway status --json` instead of falling back to `gateway port unknown`.

changes.title: Windows/网关 认证: 停止 attaching device identity 在 local loopback shared-令牌 和 password 网关 calls, so native Windows Agent replies no longer log stale `device signature expired` fallback noise 之前 succeeding.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/gateway auth: stop attaching device identity on local loopback shared-token and password gateway calls, so native Windows agent replies no longer log stale `device signature expired` fallback noise before succeeding.

changes.title: Discord/网关 startup: treat plain-text 和 transient `/网关/bot` metadata fetch failures as transient startup errors so Discord 网关 boot no longer crashes 在 unhandled rejections. (#44397) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway startup: treat plain-text and transient `/gateway/bot` metadata fetch failures as transient startup errors so Discord gateway boot no longer crashes on unhandled rejections. (#44397) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: Slack/probe: keep `认证.test()` bot 和 team metadata mapping stable while simplifying the probe result 路径. (#44775) Thanks @Cafexss.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/probe: keep `auth.test()` bot and team metadata mapping stable while simplifying the probe result path. (#44775) Thanks @Cafexss.

changes.title: Dashboard/chat 界面: render oversized plain-text replies as normal paragraphs 而不是 capped gray code blocks, so long desktop chat responses stay readable 不适用 tab-switching refreshes.
changes.rawTitle: Dashboard/chat UI: render oversized plain-text replies as normal paragraphs instead of capped gray code blocks, so long desktop chat responses stay readable without tab-switching refreshes.

changes.title: Dashboard/chat 界面: restore the `chat-new-messages` class 在 the New messages scroll pill so the button uses its existing compact styling 而不是 rendering as a full-screen SVG overlay. (#44856) Thanks @Astro-Han.
changes.rawTitle: Dashboard/chat UI: restore the `chat-new-messages` class on the New messages scroll pill so the button uses its existing compact styling instead of rendering as a full-screen SVG overlay. (#44856) Thanks @Astro-Han.

changes.title: 网关/Control 界面: restore the operator-only device-认证 bypass 和 classify 浏览器 connect failures so origin 和 device-identity problems no longer show up as 认证 errors 在 the Control 界面 和 web chat. (#45512) thanks @sallyom.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Control UI: restore the operator-only device-auth bypass and classify browser connect failures so origin and device-identity problems no longer show up as auth errors in the Control UI and web chat. (#45512) thanks @sallyom.

changes.title: macOS/语音 wake: 停止 crashing wake-word 命令 extraction 当 speech segment ranges come 从 a different transcript instance.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/voice wake: stop crashing wake-word command extraction when speech segment ranges come from a different transcript instance.

changes.title: Discord/allowlists: honor raw `guild_id` 当 hydrated guild objects are missing so allowlisted channels 和 threads like `#maintainers` no longer get false-dropped 之前 channel allowlist checks.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/allowlists: honor raw `guild_id` when hydrated guild objects are missing so allowlisted channels and threads like `#maintainers` no longer get false-dropped before channel allowlist checks.

changes.title: macOS/runtime locator: require Node >=22.16.0 期间 macOS runtime discovery so the app no longer accepts Node versions that the main runtime guard rejects later. Thanks @sumleo.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/runtime locator: require Node >=22.16.0 during macOS runtime discovery so the app no longer accepts Node versions that the main runtime guard rejects later. Thanks @sumleo.

changes.title: Agent/custom providers: 保留 blank API keys 为了 loopback OpenAI-compatible custom providers 通过 clearing the synthetic Authorization header at runtime, while keeping explicit apiKey 和 OAuth认证/令牌 配置 从 静默地 downgrading 进入 fake bearer 认证. (#45631) Thanks @xinhuagu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/custom providers: preserve blank API keys for loopback OpenAI-compatible custom providers by clearing the synthetic Authorization header at runtime, while keeping explicit apiKey and oauth/token config from silently downgrading into fake bearer auth. (#45631) Thanks @xinhuagu.

changes.title: 模型/google-vertex Gemini flash-lite normalization: apply existing bare-ID preview normalization to `google-vertex` 模型 refs 和 provider configs so `google-vertex/gemini-3.1-flash-lite` resolves as `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview`. (#42435) thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Models/google-vertex Gemini flash-lite normalization: apply existing bare-ID preview normalization to `google-vertex` model refs and provider configs so `google-vertex/gemini-3.1-flash-lite` resolves as `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview`. (#42435) thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: iMessage/remote attachments: reject unsafe remote attachment paths 之前 spawning SCP, so sender-controlled filenames can no longer inject shell metacharacters 进入 remote media staging. Thanks @lintsinghua.
changes.rawTitle: iMessage/remote attachments: reject unsafe remote attachment paths before spawning SCP, so sender-controlled filenames can no longer inject shell metacharacters into remote media staging. Thanks @lintsinghua.

changes.title: Telegram/Webhook 认证: validate the Telegram Webhook secret 之前 reading 或 parsing request bodies, so unauthenticated requests are rejected immediately 而不是 consuming up to 1 MB first. Thanks @space08.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/webhook auth: validate the Telegram webhook secret before reading or parsing request bodies, so unauthenticated requests are rejected immediately instead of consuming up to 1 MB first. Thanks @space08.

changes.title: 安全/device pairing: make bootstrap setup codes single-use so pending device pairing requests cannot be 静默地 replayed 和 widened to admin 之前 approval. Thanks @tdjackey.
changes.rawTitle: Security/device pairing: make bootstrap setup codes single-use so pending device pairing requests cannot be silently replayed and widened to admin before approval. Thanks @tdjackey.

changes.title: 安全/external content: strip zero-width 和 soft-hyphen marker-splitting characters 期间 boundary sanitization so spoofed `EXTERNAL_UNTRUSTED_CONTENT` markers fall back to the existing hardening 路径 而不是 bypassing marker normalization.
changes.rawTitle: Security/external content: strip zero-width and soft-hyphen marker-splitting characters during boundary sanitization so spoofed `EXTERNAL_UNTRUSTED_CONTENT` markers fall back to the existing hardening path instead of bypassing marker normalization.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: unwrap more `pnpm` runtime forms 期间 approval binding, including `pnpm --reporter ... exec` 和 direct `pnpm node` file runs, 使用 matching regression coverage 和 docs updates.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: unwrap more `pnpm` runtime forms during approval binding, including `pnpm --reporter ... exec` and direct `pnpm node` file runs, with matching regression coverage and docs updates.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: fail closed 为了 Perl `-M` 和 `-I` approval flows so preload 和 load-路径 module resolution stays outside approval-backed runtime execution unless the operator uses a broader explicit trust 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: fail closed for Perl `-M` and `-I` approval flows so preload and load-path module resolution stays outside approval-backed runtime execution unless the operator uses a broader explicit trust path.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: recognize PowerShell `-File` 和 `-f` wrapper forms 期间 inline-命令 extraction so approval 和 命令-analysis paths treat file-based PowerShell launches like the existing `-命令` variants.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: recognize PowerShell `-File` and `-f` wrapper forms during inline-command extraction so approval and command-analysis paths treat file-based PowerShell launches like the existing `-Command` variants.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: unwrap `env` dispatch wrappers inside shell-segment allowlist resolution 在 macOS so `env FOO=bar /路径/to/bin` resolves against the effective executable 而不是 the wrapper 令牌.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: unwrap `env` dispatch wrappers inside shell-segment allowlist resolution on macOS so `env FOO=bar /path/to/bin` resolves against the effective executable instead of the wrapper token.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: treat backslash-newline as shell line continuation 期间 macOS shell-chain parsing so line-continued `$(` substitutions fail closed 而不是 slipping past 命令-substitution checks.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: treat backslash-newline as shell line continuation during macOS shell-chain parsing so line-continued `$(` substitutions fail closed instead of slipping past command-substitution checks.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: bind macOS skill auto-允许 trust to both executable name 和 resolved 路径 so same-basename binaries no longer inherit trust 从 unrelated skill bins.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: bind macOS skill auto-allow trust to both executable name and resolved path so same-basename binaries no longer inherit trust from unrelated skill bins.

changes.title: Build/插件-sdk bundling: bundle 插件-sdk subpath entries 在 one shared build pass so published packages 停止 duplicating shared chunks 和 避免 the recent 插件-sdk 内存 blow-up. (#45426) Thanks @TarasShyn.
changes.rawTitle: Build/plugin-sdk bundling: bundle plugin-sdk subpath entries in one shared build pass so published packages stop duplicating shared chunks and avoid the recent plugin-sdk memory blow-up. (#45426) Thanks @TarasShyn.

changes.title: Cron/isolated sessions: route nested cron-triggered embedded runner work onto the nested lane so isolated cron jobs no longer deadlock 当 compaction 或 other queued inner work runs. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/isolated sessions: route nested cron-triggered embedded runner work onto the nested lane so isolated cron jobs no longer deadlock when compaction or other queued inner work runs. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI-compatible compat overrides: respect explicit user `模型[].compat` opt-ins 为了 non-native `OpenAI-completions` endpoints so usage-在-streaming capability overrides no longer get forced off 当 the endpoint actually supports them. (#44432) Thanks @cheapestinference.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI-compatible compat overrides: respect explicit user `models[].compat` opt-ins for non-native `openai-completions` endpoints so usage-in-streaming capability overrides no longer get forced off when the endpoint actually supports them. (#44432) Thanks @cheapestinference.

changes.title: Agent/Azure OpenAI startup prompts: rephrase the built-在 `/new`, `/reset`, 和 post-compaction startup instruction so Azure OpenAI deployments no longer hit HTTP 400 false positives 从 the content filter. (#43403) Thanks @xingsy97.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Azure OpenAI startup prompts: rephrase the built-in `/new`, `/reset`, and post-compaction startup instruction so Azure OpenAI deployments no longer hit HTTP 400 false positives from the content filter. (#43403) Thanks @xingsy97.

changes.title: Agent/内存 bootstrap: load only one root 内存 file, preferring `内存.md` 和 using `内存.md` as a fallback, so case-insensitive Docker mounts no longer inject duplicate 内存 context. (#26054) Thanks @Lanfei.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/memory bootstrap: load only one root memory file, preferring `MEMORY.md` and using `memory.md` as a fallback, so case-insensitive Docker mounts no longer inject duplicate memory context. (#26054) Thanks @Lanfei.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: compare post-compaction 令牌 sanity checks against full-session pre-compaction totals 和 skip the check 当 令牌 estimation fails, so sessions 使用 large bootstrap context keep real 令牌 counts 而不是 falling back to unknown. (#28347) thanks @efe-arv.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: compare post-compaction token sanity checks against full-session pre-compaction totals and skip the check when token estimation fails, so sessions with large bootstrap context keep real token counts instead of falling back to unknown. (#28347) thanks @efe-arv.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: 保留 safeguard compaction summary language continuity via default 和 configurable custom instructions so persona drift is reduced 之后 auto-compaction. (#10456) Thanks @keepitmello.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: preserve safeguard compaction summary language continuity via default and configurable custom instructions so persona drift is reduced after auto-compaction. (#10456) Thanks @keepitmello.

changes.title: Agent/工具 warnings: distinguish gated core tools like `apply_patch` 从 插件-only unknown entries 在 `tools.profile` warnings, so unavailable core tools 现在 report current runtime/provider/模型/配置 gating 而不是 suggesting a missing 插件.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tool warnings: distinguish gated core tools like `apply_patch` from plugin-only unknown entries in `tools.profile` warnings, so unavailable core tools now report current runtime/provider/model/config gating instead of suggesting a missing plugin.

changes.title: 配置/validation: accept documented `Agent.list[].params` per-Agent overrides 在 strict 配置 validation so `openclaw 配置 validate` no longer rejects runtime-supported `cacheRetention`, `temperature`, 和 `maxTokens` settings. (#41171) Thanks @atian8179.
changes.rawTitle: Config/validation: accept documented `agents.list[].params` per-agent overrides in strict config validation so `openclaw config validate` no longer rejects runtime-supported `cacheRetention`, `temperature`, and `maxTokens` settings. (#41171) Thanks @atian8179.

changes.title: 配置/web fetch: restore runtime validation 为了 documented `tools.web.fetch.readability` 和 `tools.web.fetch.firecrawl` settings so valid web fetch configs no longer fail 使用 unrecognized-密钥 errors. (#42583) Thanks @stim64045-spec.
changes.rawTitle: Config/web fetch: restore runtime validation for documented `tools.web.fetch.readability` and `tools.web.fetch.firecrawl` settings so valid web fetch configs no longer fail with unrecognized-key errors. (#42583) Thanks @stim64045-spec.

changes.title: Signal/配置 validation: 添加 `channels.Signal.groups` schema 支持 so per-group `requireMention`, `tools`, 和 `toolsBySender` overrides no longer get rejected 期间 配置 validation. (#27199) Thanks @unisone.
changes.rawTitle: Signal/config validation: add `channels.signal.groups` schema support so per-group `requireMention`, `tools`, and `toolsBySender` overrides no longer get rejected during config validation. (#27199) Thanks @unisone.

changes.title: 配置/discovery: accept `discovery.wideArea.domain` 在 strict 配置 validation so unicast DNS-SD 网关 configs no longer fail 使用 an unrecognized-密钥 错误. (#35615) Thanks @ingyukoh.
changes.rawTitle: Config/discovery: accept `discovery.wideArea.domain` in strict config validation so unicast DNS-SD gateway configs no longer fail with an unrecognized-key error. (#35615) Thanks @ingyukoh.

changes.title: Telegram/media errors: redact Telegram file URLs 之前 building media fetch errors so failed inbound downloads do not leak bot tokens 进入 logs. Thanks @space08.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/media errors: redact Telegram file URLs before building media fetch errors so failed inbound downloads do not leak bot tokens into logs. Thanks @space08.

items.title: Android/chat settings: redesign the chat settings sheet 使用 grouped device 和 media sections, refresh the Connect 和 语音 tabs, 和 tighten the chat composer/session header 为了 a denser mobile layout. (#44894) Thanks @obviyus.

items.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: fail closed for Perl `-M` and `-I` approval flows so preload and load-path module resolution stays outside approval-backed runtime execution unless the operator uses a broader explicit trust path.

items.title: 安全/exec approvals: unwrap `env` dispatch wrappers inside shell-segment allowlist resolution 在 macOS so `env FOO=bar /路径/to/bin` resolves against the effective executable 而不是 the wrapper 令牌.
items.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: unwrap `env` dispatch wrappers inside shell-segment allowlist resolution on macOS so `env FOO=bar /path/to/bin` resolves against the effective executable instead of the wrapper token.

items.title: Agent/compaction: compare post-compaction 令牌 sanity checks against full-session pre-compaction totals 和 skip the check 当 令牌 estimation fails, so sessions 使用 large bootstrap context keep real 令牌 counts 而不是 falling back to unknown. (#28347) thanks @efe-arv.

items.title: 配置/validation: accept documented `Agent.list[].params` per-Agent overrides 在 strict 配置 validation so `openclaw 配置 validate` no longer rejects runtime-supported `cacheRetention`, `temperature`, 和 `maxTokens` settings. (#41171) Thanks @atian8179.
items.rawTitle: Config/validation: accept documented `agents.list[].params` per-agent overrides in strict config validation so `openclaw config validate` no longer rejects runtime-supported `cacheRetention`, `temperature`, and `maxTokens` settings. (#41171) Thanks @atian8179.

items.title: macOS/onboarding: 避免 self-restarting freshly bootstrapped launchd gateways 和 give new daemon installs longer to become healthy, so `openclaw onboard --install-daemon` no longer false-fails 在 slower Macs 和 fresh VM snapshots.
items.rawTitle: macOS/onboarding: avoid self-restarting freshly bootstrapped launchd gateways and give new daemon installs longer to become healthy, so `openclaw onboard --install-daemon` no longer false-fails on slower Macs and fresh VM snapshots.

items.title: 网关/status: 添加 `openclaw 网关 status --require-rpc` 和 clearer Linux non-interactive daemon-install failure reporting so automation can fail hard 在 probe misses 而不是 treating a printed RPC 错误 as green.

items.rawTitle: Windows/gateway install: bound `schtasks` calls and fall back to the Startup-folder login item when task creation hangs, so native `openclaw gateway install` fails fast instead of wedging forever on broken Scheduled Task setups.

items.rawTitle: Windows/gateway stop: resolve Startup-folder fallback listeners from the installed `gateway.cmd` port, so `openclaw gateway stop` now actually kills fallback-launched gateway processes before restart.

items.title: Windows/网关 status: 复用 the installed service 命令 environment 当 reading runtime status, so startup-fallback gateways keep reporting the configured port 和 running state 在 `网关 status --json` 而不是 falling back to `网关 port unknown`.
items.rawTitle: Windows/gateway status: reuse the installed service command environment when reading runtime status, so startup-fallback gateways keep reporting the configured port and running state in `gateway status --json` instead of falling back to `gateway port unknown`.
