changes.rawTitle: Security/device pairing: switch `/pair` and `openclaw qr` setup codes to short-lived bootstrap tokens so the next release no longer embeds shared gateway credentials in chat or QR pairing payloads. Thanks @lintsinghua.

changes.title: 安全/插件: 禁用 implicit workspace 插件 auto-load so cloned repositories cannot execute workspace 插件 code 不适用 an explicit trust decision. (`GHSA-99qw-6mr3-36qr`)(#44174) Thanks @lintsinghua 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/plugins: disable implicit workspace plugin auto-load so cloned repositories cannot execute workspace plugin code without an explicit trust decision. (`GHSA-99qw-6mr3-36qr`)(#44174) Thanks @lintsinghua and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 模型/Kimi Coding: send `Anthropic-messages` tools 在 native Anthropic format 重新 so `kimi-coding` stops degrading 工具 calls 进入 XML/plain-text pseudo invocations 而不是 real `tool_use` blocks. (#38669, #39907, #40552) Thanks @opriz.
changes.rawTitle: Models/Kimi Coding: send `anthropic-messages` tools in native Anthropic format again so `kimi-coding` stops degrading tool calls into XML/plain-text pseudo invocations instead of real `tool_use` blocks. (#38669, #39907, #40552) Thanks @opriz.

changes.title: TUI/chat log: 复用 the active assistant message component 为了 the same streaming run so `openclaw tui` no longer renders duplicate assistant replies. (#35364) Thanks @lisitan.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/chat log: reuse the active assistant message component for the same streaming run so `openclaw tui` no longer renders duplicate assistant replies. (#35364) Thanks @lisitan.

changes.title: Telegram/模型 picker: make inline 模型 button selections persist the chosen session 模型 正确地, clear overrides 当 selecting the configured default, 和 include effective fallback 模型 在 `/模型` button validation. (#40105) Thanks @avirweb.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/model picker: make inline model button selections persist the chosen session model correctly, clear overrides when selecting the configured default, and include effective fallback models in `/models` button validation. (#40105) Thanks @avirweb.

changes.title: Cron/proactive delivery: keep isolated direct cron sends out 的 the write-ahead resend queue so transient-send retries do not replay duplicate proactive messages 之后 restart. (#40646) Thanks @openperf 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/proactive delivery: keep isolated direct cron sends out of the write-ahead resend queue so transient-send retries do not replay duplicate proactive messages after restart. (#40646) Thanks @openperf and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 模型/Kimi Coding: send the built-在 `User-Agent: claude-code/0.1.0` header 通过 default 为了 `kimi-coding` while still allowing explicit provider headers to override it, so Kimi Code subscription 认证 can work 不适用 a local header-injection 代理. (#30099) Thanks @Amineelfarssi 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Models/Kimi Coding: send the built-in `User-Agent: claude-code/0.1.0` header by default for `kimi-coding` while still allowing explicit provider headers to override it, so Kimi Code subscription auth can work without a local header-injection proxy. (#30099) Thanks @Amineelfarssi and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 模型/OpenAI Codex Spark: keep `gpt-5.3-Codex-spark` working 在 the `OpenAI-Codex/*` 路径 via resolver fallbacks 和 clearer Codex-only handling, while continuing to suppress the stale direct `OpenAI/*` Spark row that OpenAI rejects live.
changes.rawTitle: Models/OpenAI Codex Spark: keep `gpt-5.3-codex-spark` working on the `openai-codex/*` path via resolver fallbacks and clearer Codex-only handling, while continuing to suppress the stale direct `openai/*` Spark row that OpenAI rejects live.

changes.title: Ollama/Kimi Cloud: apply the Moonshot Kimi payload compatibility wrapper to Ollama-hosted Kimi 模型 like `kimi-k2.5:cloud`, so 工具 routing no longer breaks 当 thinking is enabled. (#41519) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama/Kimi Cloud: apply the Moonshot Kimi payload compatibility wrapper to Ollama-hosted Kimi models like `kimi-k2.5:cloud`, so tool routing no longer breaks when thinking is enabled. (#41519) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Moonshot CN API: respect explicit `baseUrl` (API.moonshot.cn) 在 implicit provider resolution so platform.moonshot.cn API keys authenticate 正确地 而不是 returning HTTP 401. (#33637) Thanks @chengzhichao-xydt.
changes.rawTitle: Moonshot CN API: respect explicit `baseUrl` (api.moonshot.cn) in implicit provider resolution so platform.moonshot.cn API keys authenticate correctly instead of returning HTTP 401. (#33637) Thanks @chengzhichao-xydt.

changes.title: Kimi Coding/provider 配置: respect explicit `模型.providers["kimi-coding"].baseUrl` 当 resolving the implicit provider so custom Kimi Coding endpoints no longer get overwritten 通过 the built-在 default. (#36353) Thanks @2233admin.
changes.rawTitle: Kimi Coding/provider config: respect explicit `models.providers["kimi-coding"].baseUrl` when resolving the implicit provider so custom Kimi Coding endpoints no longer get overwritten by the built-in default. (#36353) Thanks @2233admin.

changes.title: 网关/main-session routing: keep TUI 和 other `mode:界面` main-session sends 在 the internal surface 当 `deliver` is enabled, so replies no longer inherit the session's persisted Telegram/WhatsApp route. (#43918) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/main-session routing: keep TUI and other `mode:UI` main-session sends on the internal surface when `deliver` is enabled, so replies no longer inherit the session's persisted Telegram/WhatsApp route. (#43918) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/self-chat echo dedupe: drop reflected duplicate Webhook copies only 当 a matching `fromMe` event was just seen 为了 the same chat, body, 和 timestamp, preventing self-chat loops 不适用 broad Webhook suppression. 相关 #32166. (#38442) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/self-chat echo dedupe: drop reflected duplicate webhook copies only when a matching `fromMe` event was just seen for the same chat, body, and timestamp, preventing self-chat loops without broad webhook suppression. Related to #32166. (#38442) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: iMessage/self-chat echo dedupe: drop reflected duplicate copies only 当 a matching `is_from_me` event was just seen 为了 the same chat, text, 和 `created_at`, preventing self-chat loops 不适用 broad text-only suppression. 相关 #32166. (#38440) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: iMessage/self-chat echo dedupe: drop reflected duplicate copies only when a matching `is_from_me` event was just seen for the same chat, text, and `created_at`, preventing self-chat loops without broad text-only suppression. Related to #32166. (#38440) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Subagents/completion announce retries: raise the default announce 超时 to 90 seconds 和 停止 retrying 网关-超时 failures 为了 externally delivered completion announces, preventing duplicate user-facing completion messages 之后 slow 网关 responses. 修复 #41235. Thanks @vasujain00 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents/completion announce retries: raise the default announce timeout to 90 seconds and stop retrying gateway-timeout failures for externally delivered completion announces, preventing duplicate user-facing completion messages after slow gateway responses. Fixes #41235. Thanks @vasujain00 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Mattermost/block streaming: 修复 duplicate message delivery (one threaded, one top-level) 当 block streaming is active 通过 excluding `replyToId` 从 the block reply dedup 密钥 和 adding an explicit `threading` dock to the Mattermost 插件. (#41362) Thanks @mathiasnagler 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost/block streaming: fix duplicate message delivery (one threaded, one top-level) when block streaming is active by excluding `replyToId` from the block reply dedup key and adding an explicit `threading` dock to the Mattermost plugin. (#41362) Thanks @mathiasnagler and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Mattermost/reply media delivery: pass Agent-scoped `mediaLocalRoots` through shared reply delivery so allowed local files upload 正确地 从 button, slash-命令, 和 模型-picker replies. (#44021) Thanks @LyleLiu666.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost/reply media delivery: pass agent-scoped `mediaLocalRoots` through shared reply delivery so allowed local files upload correctly from button, slash-command, and model-picker replies. (#44021) Thanks @LyleLiu666.

changes.title: macOS/Reminders: 添加 the missing `NSRemindersUsageDescription` to the bundled app so `apple-reminders` can trigger the system permission prompt 从 OpenClaw.app. (#8559) Thanks @dinakars777.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/Reminders: add the missing `NSRemindersUsageDescription` to the bundled app so `apple-reminders` can trigger the system permission prompt from OpenClaw.app. (#8559) Thanks @dinakars777.

changes.title: 网关/session discovery: discover disk-only 和 retired ACP session stores under custom templated `session.store` roots so ACP reconciliation, session-id/session-label targeting, 和 run-id fallback keep working 之后 restart. (#44176) thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/session discovery: discover disk-only and retired ACP session stores under custom templated `session.store` roots so ACP reconciliation, session-id/session-label targeting, and run-id fallback keep working after restart. (#44176) thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 插件/env-scoped roots: 修复 插件 discovery/load caches 和 provenance tracking so same-process `HOME`/`OPENCLAW_HOME` changes no longer 复用 stale 插件 state 或 misreport `~/...` 插件 as untracked. (#44046) thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/env-scoped roots: fix plugin discovery/load caches and provenance tracking so same-process `HOME`/`OPENCLAW_HOME` changes no longer reuse stale plugin state or misreport `~/...` plugins as untracked. (#44046) thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 模型/OpenRouter native ids: canonicalize native OpenRouter 模型 keys across 配置 writes, runtime lookups, fallback management, 和 `模型 list --plain`, 和 migrate legacy duplicated `OpenRouter/OpenRouter/...` 配置 entries forward 在 write.
changes.rawTitle: Models/OpenRouter native ids: canonicalize native OpenRouter model keys across config writes, runtime lookups, fallback management, and `models list --plain`, and migrate legacy duplicated `openrouter/openrouter/...` config entries forward on write.

changes.title: Windows/native 更新: make package installs use the npm 更新 路径 而不是 the git 路径, carry portable Git 进入 native Windows updates, 和 mirror the installer's Windows npm env so `openclaw 更新` no longer dies early 在 missing `git` 或 `node-llama-cpp` download setup.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/native update: make package installs use the npm update path instead of the git path, carry portable Git into native Windows updates, and mirror the installer's Windows npm env so `openclaw update` no longer dies early on missing `git` or `node-llama-cpp` download setup.

changes.title: Sandbox/write: 保留 pinned mutation-helper payload stdin so sandboxed `write` no longer reports success while creating empty files. (#43876) Thanks @glitch418x.
changes.rawTitle: Sandbox/write: preserve pinned mutation-helper payload stdin so sandboxed `write` no longer reports success while creating empty files. (#43876) Thanks @glitch418x.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: escape invisible Unicode format characters 在 approval prompts so zero-width 命令 text renders as visible `\u{...}` escapes 而不是 spoofing the reviewed 命令. (`GHSA-pcqg-f7rg-xfvv`)(#43687) Thanks @EkiXu 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: escape invisible Unicode format characters in approval prompts so zero-width command text renders as visible `\u{...}` escapes instead of spoofing the reviewed command. (`GHSA-pcqg-f7rg-xfvv`)(#43687) Thanks @EkiXu and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Hooks/loader: fail closed 当 workspace hook paths cannot be resolved 使用 `realpath`, so unreadable 或 broken internal hook paths are skipped 而不是 falling back to unresolved imports. (#44437) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/loader: fail closed when workspace hook paths cannot be resolved with `realpath`, so unreadable or broken internal hook paths are skipped instead of falling back to unresolved imports. (#44437) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Hooks/Agent deliveries: dedupe repeated hook requests 通过 optional idempotency 密钥 so Webhook retries can 复用 the first run 而不是 launching duplicate Agent executions. (#44438) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/agent deliveries: dedupe repeated hook requests by optional idempotency key so webhook retries can reuse the first run instead of launching duplicate agent executions. (#44438) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/exec detection: normalize compatibility Unicode 和 strip invisible formatting code points 之前 obfuscation checks so zero-width 和 fullwidth 命令 tricks no longer suppress heuristic detection. (`GHSA-9r3v-37xh-2cf6`)(#44091) Thanks @wooluo 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec detection: normalize compatibility Unicode and strip invisible formatting code points before obfuscation checks so zero-width and fullwidth command tricks no longer suppress heuristic detection. (`GHSA-9r3v-37xh-2cf6`)(#44091) Thanks @wooluo and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/exec allowlist: 保留 POSIX case sensitivity 和 keep `?` within a single 路径 segment so exact-looking allowlist patterns no longer overmatch executables across case 或 directory boundaries. (`GHSA-f8r2-vg7x-gh8m`)(#43798) Thanks @zpbrent 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec allowlist: preserve POSIX case sensitivity and keep `?` within a single path segment so exact-looking allowlist patterns no longer overmatch executables across case or directory boundaries. (`GHSA-f8r2-vg7x-gh8m`)(#43798) Thanks @zpbrent and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/commands: require sender ownership 为了 `/配置` 和 `/debug` so authorized non-owner senders can no longer reach owner-only 配置 和 runtime debug surfaces. (`GHSA-r7vr-gr74-94p8`)(#44305) Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/commands: require sender ownership for `/config` and `/debug` so authorized non-owner senders can no longer reach owner-only config and runtime debug surfaces. (`GHSA-r7vr-gr74-94p8`)(#44305) Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/网关 认证: clear unbound client-declared scopes 在 shared-令牌 WebSocket connects so device-less shared-令牌 operators cannot self-declare elevated scopes. (`GHSA-rqpp-rjj8-7wv8`)(#44306) Thanks @LUOYEcode 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/gateway auth: clear unbound client-declared scopes on shared-token WebSocket connects so device-less shared-token operators cannot self-declare elevated scopes. (`GHSA-rqpp-rjj8-7wv8`)(#44306) Thanks @LUOYEcode and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/浏览器.request: block persistent 浏览器 profile create/delete routes 从 write-scoped `浏览器.request` so callers can no longer persist admin-only 浏览器 profile changes through the 浏览器 control surface. (`GHSA-vmhq-cqm9-6p7q`)(#43800) Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/browser.request: block persistent browser profile create/delete routes from write-scoped `browser.request` so callers can no longer persist admin-only browser profile changes through the browser control surface. (`GHSA-vmhq-cqm9-6p7q`)(#43800) Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/Agent: reject public spawned-run lineage fields 和 keep workspace inheritance 在 the internal spawned-session 路径 so external `Agent` callers can no longer override the 网关 workspace boundary. (`GHSA-2rqg-gjgv-84jm`)(#43801) Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/agent: reject public spawned-run lineage fields and keep workspace inheritance on the internal spawned-session path so external `agent` callers can no longer override the gateway workspace boundary. (`GHSA-2rqg-gjgv-84jm`)(#43801) Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/session_status: enforce sandbox session-tree visibility 和 shared Agent-to-Agent access guards 之前 reading 或 mutating target session state, so sandboxed subagents can no longer inspect parent session metadata 或 write parent 模型 overrides via `session_status`. (`GHSA-wcxr-59v9-rxr8`)(#43754) Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/session_status: enforce sandbox session-tree visibility and shared agent-to-agent access guards before reading or mutating target session state, so sandboxed subagents can no longer inspect parent session metadata or write parent model overrides via `session_status`. (`GHSA-wcxr-59v9-rxr8`)(#43754) Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/Agent tools: mark `nodes` as explicitly owner-only 和 document/test that `canvas` remains a shared trusted-operator surface unless a real boundary bypass exists.
changes.rawTitle: Security/agent tools: mark `nodes` as explicitly owner-only and document/test that `canvas` remains a shared trusted-operator surface unless a real boundary bypass exists.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: fail closed 为了 Ruby approval flows that use `-r`, `--require`, 或 `-I` so approval-backed commands no longer bind only the main script while extra local code-loading flags remain outside the reviewed file snapshot.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: fail closed for Ruby approval flows that use `-r`, `--require`, or `-I` so approval-backed commands no longer bind only the main script while extra local code-loading flags remain outside the reviewed file snapshot.

changes.title: 安全/device pairing: cap issued 和 verified device-令牌 scopes to each paired device's approved scope baseline so stale 或 overbroad tokens cannot exceed approved access. (`GHSA-2pwv-x786-56f8`)(#43686) Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/device pairing: cap issued and verified device-token scopes to each paired device's approved scope baseline so stale or overbroad tokens cannot exceed approved access. (`GHSA-2pwv-x786-56f8`)(#43686) Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Docs/onboarding: align the legacy wizard reference 和 `openclaw onboard` 命令 docs 使用 the Ollama onboarding flow so all onboarding reference paths 现在 document `--认证-choice ollama`, Cloud + Local mode, 和 non-interactive usage. (#43473) Thanks @BruceMacD.
changes.rawTitle: Docs/onboarding: align the legacy wizard reference and `openclaw onboard` command docs with the Ollama onboarding flow so all onboarding reference paths now document `--auth-choice ollama`, Cloud + Local mode, and non-interactive usage. (#43473) Thanks @BruceMacD.

changes.title: 模型/secrets: enforce source-managed SecretRef markers 在 generated `模型.json` so runtime-resolved provider secrets are not persisted 当 runtime projection is skipped. (#43759) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Models/secrets: enforce source-managed SecretRef markers in generated `models.json` so runtime-resolved provider secrets are not persisted when runtime projection is skipped. (#43759) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: 安全/WebSocket preauth: shorten unauthenticated handshake retention 和 reject oversized pre-认证 frames 之前 application-layer parsing to reduce pre-pairing exposure 在 unsupported public deployments. (`GHSA-jv4g-m82p-2j93`)(#44089) (`GHSA-xwx2-ppv2-wx98`)(#44089) Thanks @ez-lbz 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/WebSocket preauth: shorten unauthenticated handshake retention and reject oversized pre-auth frames before application-layer parsing to reduce pre-pairing exposure on unsupported public deployments. (`GHSA-jv4g-m82p-2j93`)(#44089) (`GHSA-xwx2-ppv2-wx98`)(#44089) Thanks @ez-lbz and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/代理 attachments: restore the shared media-store size cap 为了 persisted 浏览器 代理 files so oversized payloads are rejected 而不是 overriding the intended 5 MB limit. (`GHSA-6rph-mmhp-h7h9`)(#43684) Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/proxy attachments: restore the shared media-store size cap for persisted browser proxy files so oversized payloads are rejected instead of overriding the intended 5 MB limit. (`GHSA-6rph-mmhp-h7h9`)(#43684) Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/host env: block inherited `GIT_EXEC_PATH` 从 sanitized host exec environments so Git helper resolution cannot be steered 通过 host environment state. (`GHSA-jf5v-pqgw-gm5m`)(#43685) Thanks @zpbrent 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/host env: block inherited `GIT_EXEC_PATH` from sanitized host exec environments so Git helper resolution cannot be steered by host environment state. (`GHSA-jf5v-pqgw-gm5m`)(#43685) Thanks @zpbrent and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/飞书 Webhook: require `encryptKey` alongside `verificationToken` 在 Webhook mode so unsigned forged events are rejected 而不是 being processed 使用 令牌-only configuration. (`GHSA-g353-mgv3-8pcj`)(#44087) Thanks @lintsinghua 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Feishu webhook: require `encryptKey` alongside `verificationToken` in webhook mode so unsigned forged events are rejected instead of being processed with token-only configuration. (`GHSA-g353-mgv3-8pcj`)(#44087) Thanks @lintsinghua and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/飞书 reactions: 保留 looked-up group chat typing 和 fail closed 在 ambiguous reaction context so group authorization 和 mention gating cannot be bypassed through synthetic `p2p` reactions. (`GHSA-m69h-jm2f-2pv8`)(#44088) Thanks @zpbrent 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Feishu reactions: preserve looked-up group chat typing and fail closed on ambiguous reaction context so group authorization and mention gating cannot be bypassed through synthetic `p2p` reactions. (`GHSA-m69h-jm2f-2pv8`)(#44088) Thanks @zpbrent and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/LINE Webhook: require signatures 为了 empty-event POST probes too so unsigned requests no longer confirm Webhook reachability 使用 a `200` response. (`GHSA-mhxh-9pjm-w7q5`)(#44090) Thanks @TerminalsandCoffee 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/LINE webhook: require signatures for empty-event POST probes too so unsigned requests no longer confirm webhook reachability with a `200` response. (`GHSA-mhxh-9pjm-w7q5`)(#44090) Thanks @TerminalsandCoffee and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/Zalo Webhook: rate limit invalid secret guesses 之前 认证 so weak Webhook secrets cannot be brute-forced through unauthenticated churned requests 不适用 pre-认证 `429` responses. (`GHSA-5m9r-p9g7-679c`)(#44173) Thanks @zpbrent 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Zalo webhook: rate limit invalid secret guesses before auth so weak webhook secrets cannot be brute-forced through unauthenticated churned requests without pre-auth `429` responses. (`GHSA-5m9r-p9g7-679c`)(#44173) Thanks @zpbrent and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/Zalouser groups: require stable group IDs 为了 allowlist 认证 通过 default 和 gate mutable group-name matching behind `channels.zalouser.dangerouslyAllowNameMatching`. Thanks @zpbrent.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Zalouser groups: require stable group IDs for allowlist auth by default and gate mutable group-name matching behind `channels.zalouser.dangerouslyAllowNameMatching`. Thanks @zpbrent.

changes.title: 安全/Slack 和 Teams routing: require stable channel 和 team IDs 为了 allowlist routing 通过 default, 使用 mutable name matching only via each channel's `dangerouslyAllowNameMatching` break-glass flag.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Slack and Teams routing: require stable channel and team IDs for allowlist routing by default, with mutable name matching only via each channel's `dangerouslyAllowNameMatching` break-glass flag.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: fail closed 为了 ambiguous inline loader 和 shell-payload script execution, bind the real script 之后 POSIX shell value-taking flags, 和 unwrap `pnpm`/`npm exec`/`npx` script runners 之前 approval binding. changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: fail closed for ambiguous inline loader and shell-payload script execution, bind the real script after POSIX shell value-taking flags, and unwrap `pnpm`/`npm exec`/`npx` script runners before approval binding. changes.rawTitle: Doctor/gateway service audit: canonicalize service entrypoint paths before comparing them so symlink-vs-realpath installs no longer trigger false "entrypoint does not match the current install" repair prompts. (#43882) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.rawTitle: Doctor/gateway service audit: earlier groundwork for this fix landed in the superseded #28338 branch. Thanks @realriphub.

changes.title: 网关/session stores: regenerate the Swift push-test protocol 模型 和 align Windows native session-store realpath handling so protocol checks 和 sync session discovery 停止 drifting 在 Windows. (#44266) thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/session stores: regenerate the Swift push-test protocol models and align Windows native session-store realpath handling so protocol checks and sync session discovery stop drifting on Windows. (#44266) thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: Agent/failover: classify z.ai `network_error` 停止 reasons as retryable timeouts so provider connectivity failures trigger fallback 而不是 surfacing raw unhandled-停止-reason errors. (#43884) Thanks @hougangdev.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify z.ai `network_error` stop reasons as retryable timeouts so provider connectivity failures trigger fallback instead of surfacing raw unhandled-stop-reason errors. (#43884) Thanks @hougangdev.

changes.rawTitle: Memory/session sync: add mode-aware post-compaction session reindexing with `agents.defaults.compaction.postIndexSync` plus `agents.defaults.memorySearch.sync.sessions.postCompactionForce`, so compacted session memory can refresh immediately without forcing every deployment into synchronous reindexing. (#25561) thanks @rodrigouroz.

changes.title: Telegram/模型 picker: make inline 模型 button selections persist the chosen session 模型 正确地, clear overrides 当 selecting the configured default, 和 include effective fallback 模型 在 `/模型` button validation. (#40105) Thanks @avirweb.

changes.title: Mattermost/reply media delivery: pass Agent-scoped `mediaLocalRoots` through shared reply delivery so allowed local files upload 正确地 从 button, slash-命令, 和 模型-picker replies. (#44021) Thanks @LyleLiu666.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost/reply media delivery: pass agent-scoped `mediaLocalRoots` through shared reply delivery so allowed local files upload correctly from button, slash-command, and model-picker replies. (#44021) Thanks @LyleLiu666.

changes.title: 插件/env-scoped roots: 修复 插件 discovery/load caches 和 provenance tracking so same-process `HOME`/`OPENCLAW_HOME` changes no longer 复用 stale 插件 state 或 misreport `~/...` 插件 as untracked. (#44046) thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/env-scoped roots: fix plugin discovery/load caches and provenance tracking so same-process `HOME`/`OPENCLAW_HOME` changes no longer reuse stale plugin state or misreport `~/...` plugins as untracked. (#44046) thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 网关/session discovery: discover disk-only 和 retired ACP session stores under custom templated `session.store` roots so ACP reconciliation, session-id/session-label targeting, 和 run-id fallback keep working 之后 restart. (#44176) thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/session discovery: discover disk-only and retired ACP session stores under custom templated `session.store` roots so ACP reconciliation, session-id/session-label targeting, and run-id fallback keep working after restart. (#44176) thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 模型/OpenRouter native ids: canonicalize native OpenRouter 模型 keys across 配置 writes, runtime lookups, fallback management, 和 `模型 list --plain`, 和 migrate legacy duplicated `OpenRouter/OpenRouter/...` 配置 entries forward 在 write.

changes.title: 网关/hooks: bucket hook 认证 failures 通过 forwarded client IP behind trusted proxies 和 warn 当 `hooks.allowedAgentIds` leaves hook routing unrestricted.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: skip the post-compaction `cache-ttl` marker write 当 a compaction completed 在 the same attempt, preventing the next turn 从 immediately triggering a second tiny compaction. (#28548) thanks @MoerAI.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: skip the post-compaction `cache-ttl` marker write when a compaction completed in the same attempt, preventing the next turn from immediately triggering a second tiny compaction. (#28548) thanks @MoerAI.

changes.title: Native chat/macOS: 添加 `/new`, `/reset`, 和 `/clear` reset triggers, keep shared main-session aliases aligned, 和 ignore stale 模型-selection completions so native chat state stays 在 sync across reset 和 fast 模型 changes. (#10898) Thanks @Nachx639.
changes.rawTitle: Native chat/macOS: add `/new`, `/reset`, and `/clear` reset triggers, keep shared main-session aliases aligned, and ignore stale model-selection completions so native chat state stays in sync across reset and fast model changes. (#10898) Thanks @Nachx639.

items.title: iMessage/self-chat echo dedupe: drop reflected duplicate copies only 当 a matching `is_from_me` event was just seen 为了 the same chat, text, 和 `created_at`, preventing self-chat loops 不适用 broad text-only suppression. 相关 #32166. (#38440) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Subagents/completion announce retries: raise the default announce 超时 to 90 seconds 和 停止 retrying 网关-超时 failures 为了 externally delivered completion announces, preventing duplicate user-facing completion messages 之后 slow 网关 responses. 修复 #41235. Thanks @vasujain00 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Subagents/completion announce retries: raise the default announce timeout to 90 seconds and stop retrying gateway-timeout failures for externally delivered completion announces, preventing duplicate user-facing completion messages after slow gateway responses. Fixes #41235. Thanks @vasujain00 and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Mattermost/block streaming: 修复 duplicate message delivery (one threaded, one top-level) 当 block streaming is active 通过 excluding `replyToId` 从 the block reply dedup 密钥 和 adding an explicit `threading` dock to the Mattermost 插件. (#41362) Thanks @mathiasnagler 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Mattermost/block streaming: fix duplicate message delivery (one threaded, one top-level) when block streaming is active by excluding `replyToId` from the block reply dedup key and adding an explicit `threading` dock to the Mattermost plugin. (#41362) Thanks @mathiasnagler and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 安全/飞书 Webhook: require `encryptKey` alongside `verificationToken` 在 Webhook mode so unsigned forged events are rejected 而不是 being processed 使用 令牌-only configuration. (`GHSA-g353-mgv3-8pcj`)(#44087) Thanks @lintsinghua 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Security/Feishu webhook: require `encryptKey` alongside `verificationToken` in webhook mode so unsigned forged events are rejected instead of being processed with token-only configuration. (`GHSA-g353-mgv3-8pcj`)(#44087) Thanks @lintsinghua and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 安全/飞书 reactions: 保留 looked-up group chat typing 和 fail closed 在 ambiguous reaction context so group authorization 和 mention gating cannot be bypassed through synthetic `p2p` reactions. (`GHSA-m69h-jm2f-2pv8`)(#44088) Thanks @zpbrent 和 @vincentkoc.

items.title: Hooks/Agent deliveries: dedupe repeated hook requests 通过 optional idempotency 密钥 so Webhook retries can 复用 the first run 而不是 launching duplicate Agent executions. (#44438) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Hooks/agent deliveries: dedupe repeated hook requests by optional idempotency key so webhook retries can reuse the first run instead of launching duplicate agent executions. (#44438) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 安全/commands: require sender ownership 为了 `/配置` 和 `/debug` so authorized non-owner senders can no longer reach owner-only 配置 和 runtime debug surfaces. (`GHSA-r7vr-gr74-94p8`)(#44305) Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Security/commands: require sender ownership for `/config` and `/debug` so authorized non-owner senders can no longer reach owner-only config and runtime debug surfaces. (`GHSA-r7vr-gr74-94p8`)(#44305) Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 安全/Agent: reject public spawned-run lineage fields 和 keep workspace inheritance 在 the internal spawned-session 路径 so external `Agent` callers can no longer override the 网关 workspace boundary. (`GHSA-2rqg-gjgv-84jm`)(#43801) Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Security/agent: reject public spawned-run lineage fields and keep workspace inheritance on the internal spawned-session path so external `agent` callers can no longer override the gateway workspace boundary. (`GHSA-2rqg-gjgv-84jm`)(#43801) Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Gateway/hooks: bucket hook auth failures by forwarded client IP behind trusted proxies and warn when `hooks.allowedAgentIds` leaves hook routing unrestricted.

items.title: Agent/compaction: skip the post-compaction `cache-ttl` marker write 当 a compaction completed 在 the same attempt, preventing the next turn 从 immediately triggering a second tiny compaction. (#28548) thanks @MoerAI.

items.title: BlueBubbles/self-chat echo dedupe: drop reflected duplicate Webhook copies only 当 a matching `fromMe` event was just seen 为了 the same chat, body, 和 timestamp, preventing self-chat loops 不适用 broad Webhook suppression. 相关 #32166. (#38442) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/self-chat echo dedupe: drop reflected duplicate webhook copies only when a matching `fromMe` event was just seen for the same chat, body, and timestamp, preventing self-chat loops without broad webhook suppression. Related to #32166. (#38442) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 安全/LINE Webhook: require signatures 为了 empty-event POST probes too so unsigned requests no longer confirm Webhook reachability 使用 a `200` response. (`GHSA-mhxh-9pjm-w7q5`)(#44090) Thanks @TerminalsandCoffee 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Security/LINE webhook: require signatures for empty-event POST probes too so unsigned requests no longer confirm webhook reachability with a `200` response. (`GHSA-mhxh-9pjm-w7q5`)(#44090) Thanks @TerminalsandCoffee and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 安全/Zalo Webhook: rate limit invalid secret guesses 之前 认证 so weak Webhook secrets cannot be brute-forced through unauthenticated churned requests 不适用 pre-认证 `429` responses. (`GHSA-5m9r-p9g7-679c`)(#44173) Thanks @zpbrent 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Security/Zalo webhook: rate limit invalid secret guesses before auth so weak webhook secrets cannot be brute-forced through unauthenticated churned requests without pre-auth `429` responses. (`GHSA-5m9r-p9g7-679c`)(#44173) Thanks @zpbrent and @vincentkoc.

items.title: macOS/Reminders: 添加 the missing `NSRemindersUsageDescription` to the bundled app so `apple-reminders` can trigger the system permission prompt 从 OpenClaw.app. (#8559) Thanks @dinakars777.
items.rawTitle: macOS/Reminders: add the missing `NSRemindersUsageDescription` to the bundled app so `apple-reminders` can trigger the system permission prompt from OpenClaw.app. (#8559) Thanks @dinakars777.

items.title: 安全/exec detection: normalize compatibility Unicode 和 strip invisible formatting code points 之前 obfuscation checks so zero-width 和 fullwidth 命令 tricks no longer suppress heuristic detection. (`GHSA-9r3v-37xh-2cf6`)(#44091) Thanks @wooluo 和 @vincentkoc.

items.title: 安全/exec allowlist: 保留 POSIX case sensitivity 和 keep `?` within a single 路径 segment so exact-looking allowlist patterns no longer overmatch executables across case 或 directory boundaries. (`GHSA-f8r2-vg7x-gh8m`)(#43798) Thanks @zpbrent 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Security/exec allowlist: preserve POSIX case sensitivity and keep `?` within a single path segment so exact-looking allowlist patterns no longer overmatch executables across case or directory boundaries. (`GHSA-f8r2-vg7x-gh8m`)(#43798) Thanks @zpbrent and @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: fail closed for Ruby approval flows that use `-r`, `--require`, or `-I` so approval-backed commands no longer bind only the main script while extra local code-loading flags remain outside the reviewed file snapshot.

changes.title: 网关/WebSocket: enforce 浏览器 origin validation 为了 all 浏览器-originated connections regardless 的 whether 代理 headers are present, closing a cross-site WebSocket hijacking 路径 在 `trusted-代理` mode that could grant untrusted origins `operator.admin` access. (GHSA-5wcw-8jjv-m286)

changes.title: Telegram/final preview delivery followup: keep ambiguous missing-`message_id` finals only 当 a preview was already visible, while first-preview/no-id cases still fall back so Telegram users do not lose the final reply. (#41932) thanks @hougangdev.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/final preview delivery followup: keep ambiguous missing-`message_id` finals only when a preview was already visible, while first-preview/no-id cases still fall back so Telegram users do not lose the final reply. (#41932) thanks @hougangdev.

changes.title: Telegram/final preview cleanup follow-up: clear stale cleanup-retain state only 为了 transient preview finals so archived-preview retains no longer leave a stale partial bubble beside a later fallback-sent final. (#41763) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/final preview cleanup follow-up: clear stale cleanup-retain state only for transient preview finals so archived-preview retains no longer leave a stale partial bubble beside a later fallback-sent final. (#41763) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 网关/认证: 允许 one trusted device-令牌 重试 在 shared-令牌 mismatch 使用 recovery hints to 防止 reconnect churn 期间 令牌 drift. (#42507) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: allow one trusted device-token retry on shared-token mismatch with recovery hints to prevent reconnect churn during token drift. (#42507) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: 网关/配置 errors: surface up to three validation issues 在 top-level `配置.set`, `配置.patch`, 和 `配置.apply` 错误 messages while preserving structured issue details. (#42664) Thanks @huntharo.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/config errors: surface up to three validation issues in top-level `config.set`, `config.patch`, and `config.apply` error messages while preserving structured issue details. (#42664) Thanks @huntharo.

changes.title: Agent/Azure OpenAI Responses: include the `azure-OpenAI` provider 在 the Responses API store override so Azure OpenAI multi-turn cron jobs 和 embedded Agent runs no longer fail 使用 HTTP 400 "store is set to false". (#42934, 修复 #42800) Thanks @ademczuk.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Azure OpenAI Responses: include the `azure-openai` provider in the Responses API store override so Azure OpenAI multi-turn cron jobs and embedded agent runs no longer fail with HTTP 400 "store is set to false". (#42934, fixes #42800) Thanks @ademczuk.

changes.title: Agent/错误 rendering: ignore stale assistant `errorMessage` fields 在 successful turns so background/工具-side failures no longer prepend synthetic billing errors over valid replies. (#40616) Thanks @ingyukoh.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/error rendering: ignore stale assistant `errorMessage` fields on successful turns so background/tool-side failures no longer prepend synthetic billing errors over valid replies. (#40616) Thanks @ingyukoh.

changes.title: Agent/billing recovery: probe single-provider billing cooldowns 在 the existing throttle so topping up credits can recover 不适用 a manual 网关 restart. (#41422) thanks @altaywtf.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/billing recovery: probe single-provider billing cooldowns on the existing throttle so topping up credits can recover without a manual gateway restart. (#41422) thanks @altaywtf.

changes.title: Agent/fallback: treat HTTP 499 responses as transient 在 both raw-text 和 structured failover paths so Anthropic-style client-closed overload responses trigger 模型 fallback reliably. (#41468) thanks @zeroasterisk.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/fallback: treat HTTP 499 responses as transient in both raw-text and structured failover paths so Anthropic-style client-closed overload responses trigger model fallback reliably. (#41468) thanks @zeroasterisk.

changes.title: Agent/fallback: recognize Venice `402 Insufficient USD 或 Diem balance` billing errors so configured 模型 fallbacks trigger 而不是 surfacing the raw provider 错误. (#43205) Thanks @Squabble9.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/fallback: recognize Venice `402 Insufficient USD or Diem balance` billing errors so configured model fallbacks trigger instead of surfacing the raw provider error. (#43205) Thanks @Squabble9.

changes.title: Agent/fallback: recognize Poe `402 You've used up your points!` billing errors so configured 模型 fallbacks trigger 而不是 surfacing the raw provider 错误. (#42278) Thanks @CryUshio.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/fallback: recognize Poe `402 You've used up your points!` billing errors so configured model fallbacks trigger instead of surfacing the raw provider error. (#42278) Thanks @CryUshio.

changes.title: Agent/failover: treat Gemini `MALFORMED_RESPONSE` 停止 reasons as retryable timeouts so preview-模型 enum drift falls back cleanly 而不是 crashing the run, 不适用 also reclassifying malformed function-call errors. (#42292) Thanks @jnMetaCode.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: treat Gemini `MALFORMED_RESPONSE` stop reasons as retryable timeouts so preview-model enum drift falls back cleanly instead of crashing the run, without also reclassifying malformed function-call errors. (#42292) Thanks @jnMetaCode.

changes.title: Agent/cooldowns: default cooldown Windows 使用 no recorded failure history to `unknown` 而不是 `rate_limit`, avoiding false API rate-limit warnings while preserving cooldown recovery probes. (#42911) Thanks @VibhorGautam.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/cooldowns: default cooldown windows with no recorded failure history to `unknown` instead of `rate_limit`, avoiding false API rate-limit warnings while preserving cooldown recovery probes. (#42911) Thanks @VibhorGautam.

changes.title: 认证/cooldowns: reset expired 认证-profile cooldown 错误 counters 之前 computing the next backoff so stale 在-disk counters do not re-escalate 进入 long cooldown loops 之后 expiry. (#41028) thanks @zerone0x.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/cooldowns: reset expired auth-profile cooldown error counters before computing the next backoff so stale on-disk counters do not re-escalate into long cooldown loops after expiry. (#41028) thanks @zerone0x.

changes.title: Agent/内存 flush: forward `memoryFlushWritePath` through `runEmbeddedPiAgent` so 内存-triggered flush turns keep the append-only write guard 不适用 aborting 之前 工具 setup. Follows up 在 #38574. (#41761) Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/memory flush: forward `memoryFlushWritePath` through `runEmbeddedPiAgent` so memory-triggered flush turns keep the append-only write guard without aborting before tool setup. Follows up on #38574. (#41761) Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: Agent/context pruning: prune image-only 工具 results 期间 soft-trim, align context-pruning coverage 使用 the new 工具-result contract, 和 extend historical image cleanup to the same screenshot-heavy session 路径. (#43045) Thanks @MoerAI.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/context pruning: prune image-only tool results during soft-trim, align context-pruning coverage with the new tool-result contract, and extend historical image cleanup to the same screenshot-heavy session path. (#43045) Thanks @MoerAI.

changes.title: Sessions/reset 模型 recompute: clear stale runtime 模型, context-令牌, 和 system-prompt metadata 之前 session resets recompute the replacement session, so resets pick up current defaults 和 explicit overrides 而不是 reusing old runtime 模型 state. (#41173) thanks @PonyX-lab.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/reset model recompute: clear stale runtime model, context-token, and system-prompt metadata before session resets recompute the replacement session, so resets pick up current defaults and explicit overrides instead of reusing old runtime model state. (#41173) thanks @PonyX-lab.

changes.title: Channels/allowlists: 移除 stale matcher caching so same-array allowlist edits 和 wildcard replacements take effect immediately, 使用 regression coverage 为了 在-place mutation cases.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/allowlists: remove stale matcher caching so same-array allowlist edits and wildcard replacements take effect immediately, with regression coverage for in-place mutation cases.

changes.title: Discord/Telegram outbound runtime 配置: thread runtime-resolved 配置 through Discord 和 Telegram send paths so SecretRef-based credentials stay resolved 期间 message delivery. (#42352) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/Telegram outbound runtime config: thread runtime-resolved config through Discord and Telegram send paths so SecretRef-based credentials stay resolved during message delivery. (#42352) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Tools/web search: treat Brave `llm-context` grounding snippets as plain strings so `web_search` no longer returns empty snippet arrays 在 LLM Context mode. (#41387) thanks @zheliu2.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/web search: treat Brave `llm-context` grounding snippets as plain strings so `web_search` no longer returns empty snippet arrays in LLM Context mode. (#41387) thanks @zheliu2.

changes.title: Tools/web search: recover OpenRouter Perplexity citation extraction 从 `message.annotations` 当 chat-completions responses omit top-level citations. (#40881) Thanks @laurieluo.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/web search: recover OpenRouter Perplexity citation extraction from `message.annotations` when chat-completions responses omit top-level citations. (#40881) Thanks @laurieluo.

changes.title: CLI/skills JSON: strip ANSI 和 C1 control bytes 从 `skills list --json`, `skills info --json`, 和 `skills check --json` so machine-readable output stays valid 为了 terminals 和 skill metadata 使用 embedded control characters. 修复 #27530. Related #27557. Thanks @Jimmy-xuzimo 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/skills JSON: strip ANSI and C1 control bytes from `skills list --json`, `skills info --json`, and `skills check --json` so machine-readable output stays valid for terminals and skill metadata with embedded control characters. Fixes #27530. Related #27557. Thanks @Jimmy-xuzimo and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/tables: default shared tables to ASCII borders 在 legacy Windows consoles while keeping Unicode borders 在 modern Windows terminals, so commands like `openclaw skills` 停止 rendering mojibake under GBK/936 consoles. 修复 #40853. Related #41015. Thanks @ApacheBin 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/tables: default shared tables to ASCII borders on legacy Windows consoles while keeping Unicode borders on modern Windows terminals, so commands like `openclaw skills` stop rendering mojibake under GBK/936 consoles. Fixes #40853. Related #41015. Thanks @ApacheBin and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/内存 teardown: close cached 内存 search/index managers 在 the one-shot CLI shutdown 路径 so watcher-backed 内存 caches no longer keep completed CLI runs alive 之后 output finishes. (#40389) thanks @Julbarth.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/memory teardown: close cached memory search/index managers in the one-shot CLI shutdown path so watcher-backed memory caches no longer keep completed CLI runs alive after output finishes. (#40389) thanks @Julbarth.

changes.title: Control 界面/Sessions: restore single-column session table collapse 在 narrow viewport 或 container widths 通过 moving the responsive table override next to the base grid rule 和 enabling inline-size container queries. (#12175) Thanks @benjipeng.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Sessions: restore single-column session table collapse on narrow viewport or container widths by moving the responsive table override next to the base grid rule and enabling inline-size container queries. (#12175) Thanks @benjipeng.

changes.title: Telegram/network env-代理: apply configured transport policy to proxied HTTPS dispatchers as well as direct `NO_PROXY` bypasses, so resolver-scoped IPv4 fallback 和 network settings work consistently 为了 env-proxied Telegram traffic. (#40740) Thanks @sircrumpet.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/network env-proxy: apply configured transport policy to proxied HTTPS dispatchers as well as direct `NO_PROXY` bypasses, so resolver-scoped IPv4 fallback and network settings work consistently for env-proxied Telegram traffic. (#40740) Thanks @sircrumpet.

changes.title: Mattermost/Markdown formatting: 保留 first-line indentation 当 stripping bot mentions so nested list items 和 indented code blocks keep their structure, 和 render Mattermost tables natively 通过 default 而不是 fenced-code fallback. (#18655) thanks @echo931.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost/Markdown formatting: preserve first-line indentation when stripping bot mentions so nested list items and indented code blocks keep their structure, and render Mattermost tables natively by default instead of fenced-code fallback. (#18655) thanks @echo931.

changes.title: Mattermost/插件 send actions: normalize direct `replyTo` fallback handling so threaded 插件 sends trim blank IDs 和 复用 the correct reply target 重新. (#41176) Thanks @hnykda.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost/plugin send actions: normalize direct `replyTo` fallback handling so threaded plugin sends trim blank IDs and reuse the correct reply target again. (#41176) Thanks @hnykda.

changes.title: MS Teams/allowlist resolution: use the General channel conversation ID as the resolved team 密钥 (使用 Graph GUID fallback) so Bot Framework runtime `channelData.team.id` matching works 为了 team 和 team/channel allowlist entries. (#41838) Thanks @BradGroux.
changes.rawTitle: MS Teams/allowlist resolution: use the General channel conversation ID as the resolved team key (with Graph GUID fallback) so Bot Framework runtime `channelData.team.id` matching works for team and team/channel allowlist entries. (#41838) Thanks @BradGroux.

changes.title: Signal/配置 schema: accept `channels.Signal.accountUuid` 在 strict 配置 validation so loop-protection configs no longer fail 使用 an unrecognized-密钥 错误. (#35578) Thanks @ingyukoh.
changes.rawTitle: Signal/config schema: accept `channels.signal.accountUuid` in strict config validation so loop-protection configs no longer fail with an unrecognized-key error. (#35578) Thanks @ingyukoh.

changes.title: Telegram/配置 schema: accept `channels.Telegram.actions.editMessage` 和 `createForumTopic` 在 strict 配置 validation so existing Telegram action toggles no longer fail as unrecognized keys. (#35498) Thanks @ingyukoh.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/config schema: accept `channels.telegram.actions.editMessage` and `createForumTopic` in strict config validation so existing Telegram action toggles no longer fail as unrecognized keys. (#35498) Thanks @ingyukoh.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/docs: clarify that `channels.telegram.groups` allowlists chats while `groupAllowFrom` allowlists users inside those chats, and point invalid negative chat IDs at the right config key. (#42451) Thanks @altaywtf.

changes.title: Discord/配置 typing: expose channel-level `autoThread` 在 the canonical guild-channel 配置 type so strict 配置 loading matches the existing Discord schema 和 runtime behavior. (#35608) Thanks @ingyukoh.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/config typing: expose channel-level `autoThread` on the canonical guild-channel config type so strict config loading matches the existing Discord schema and runtime behavior. (#35608) Thanks @ingyukoh.

changes.rawTitle: fix(models): guard optional model.input capability checks (#42096) thanks @andyliu

changes.rawTitle: Models/Alibaba Cloud Model Studio: wire `MODELSTUDIO_API_KEY` through shared env auth, implicit provider discovery, and shell-env fallback so onboarding works outside the wizard too. (#40634) Thanks @pomelo-nwu.

changes.title: 解决 web 工具 SecretRefs atomically at runtime. (#41599) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Resolve web tool SecretRefs atomically at runtime. (#41599) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Secret files: harden CLI 和 channel credential file reads against 路径-swap races 通过 requiring direct regular files 为了 `*File` secret inputs 和 rejecting symlink-backed secret files.
changes.rawTitle: Secret files: harden CLI and channel credential file reads against path-swap races by requiring direct regular files for `*File` secret inputs and rejecting symlink-backed secret files.

changes.title: Archive extraction: harden TAR 和 external `tar.bz2` installs against destination symlink 和 pre-existing child-symlink escapes 通过 extracting 进入 staging first 和 merging 进入 the canonical destination 使用 safe file opens.
changes.rawTitle: Archive extraction: harden TAR and external `tar.bz2` installs against destination symlink and pre-existing child-symlink escapes by extracting into staging first and merging into the canonical destination with safe file opens.

changes.title: Secrets/SecretRef: reject exec SecretRef traversal ids across schema, runtime, 和 网关. (#42370) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/SecretRef: reject exec SecretRef traversal ids across schema, runtime, and gateway. (#42370) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Sandbox/fs bridge: pin staged writes to verified parent directories so temporary write files cannot materialize outside the allowed mount 之前 atomic replace. Thanks @tdjackey.
changes.rawTitle: Sandbox/fs bridge: pin staged writes to verified parent directories so temporary write files cannot materialize outside the allowed mount before atomic replace. Thanks @tdjackey.

changes.title: 网关/认证: fail closed 当 local `网关.认证.*` SecretRefs are configured 但是 unavailable, 而不是 静默地 falling back to `网关.remote.*` credentials 在 local mode. (#42672) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: fail closed when local `gateway.auth.*` SecretRefs are configured but unavailable, instead of silently falling back to `gateway.remote.*` credentials in local mode. (#42672) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Commands/配置 writes: enforce `configWrites` against both the originating account 和 the targeted account scope 为了 `/配置` 和 配置-backed `/allowlist` edits, blocking sibling-account mutations while preserving 网关 `operator.admin` flows. Thanks @tdjackey 为了 reporting.
changes.rawTitle: Commands/config writes: enforce `configWrites` against both the originating account and the targeted account scope for `/config` and config-backed `/allowlist` edits, blocking sibling-account mutations while preserving gateway `operator.admin` flows. Thanks @tdjackey for reporting.

changes.title: 安全/system.run: fail closed 为了 approval-backed interpreter/runtime commands 当 OpenClaw cannot bind exactly one concrete local file operand, while extending best-effort direct-file binding to additional runtime forms. Thanks @tdjackey 为了 reporting.
changes.rawTitle: Security/system.run: fail closed for approval-backed interpreter/runtime commands when OpenClaw cannot bind exactly one concrete local file operand, while extending best-effort direct-file binding to additional runtime forms. Thanks @tdjackey for reporting.

changes.title: 网关/session reset 认证: split conversation `/new` 和 `/reset` handling away 从 the admin-only `sessions.reset` control-plane RPC so write-scoped 网关 callers can no longer reach the privileged reset 路径 through `Agent`. Thanks @tdjackey 为了 reporting.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/session reset auth: split conversation `/new` and `/reset` handling away from the admin-only `sessions.reset` control-plane RPC so write-scoped gateway callers can no longer reach the privileged reset path through `agent`. Thanks @tdjackey for reporting.

changes.title: 安全/插件 runtime: 停止 unauthenticated 插件 HTTP routes 从 inheriting synthetic admin 网关 scopes 当 they call `runtime.subagent.*`, so admin-only methods like `sessions.delete` stay blocked 不适用 网关 认证.
changes.rawTitle: Security/plugin runtime: stop unauthenticated plugin HTTP routes from inheriting synthetic admin gateway scopes when they call `runtime.subagent.*`, so admin-only methods like `sessions.delete` stay blocked without gateway auth.

changes.title: 安全/session_status: enforce sandbox session-tree visibility 和 shared Agent-to-Agent access guards 之前 reading 或 mutating target session state, so sandboxed subagents can no longer inspect parent session metadata 或 write parent 模型 overrides via `session_status`.
changes.rawTitle: Security/session_status: enforce sandbox session-tree visibility and shared agent-to-agent access guards before reading or mutating target session state, so sandboxed subagents can no longer inspect parent session metadata or write parent model overrides via `session_status`.

changes.title: 安全/nodes: treat the `nodes` Agent 工具 as owner-only fallback policy so non-owner senders cannot reach paired-node approval 或 invoke paths through the shared 工具 set.
changes.rawTitle: Security/nodes: treat the `nodes` agent tool as owner-only fallback policy so non-owner senders cannot reach paired-node approval or invoke paths through the shared tool set.

changes.title: 安全/external content: treat whitespace-delimited `EXTERNAL UNTRUSTED CONTENT` boundary markers like underscore-delimited variants so prompt wrappers cannot bypass marker sanitization. (#35983) Thanks @urianpaul94.
changes.rawTitle: Security/external content: treat whitespace-delimited `EXTERNAL UNTRUSTED CONTENT` boundary markers like underscore-delimited variants so prompt wrappers cannot bypass marker sanitization. (#35983) Thanks @urianpaul94.

changes.title: Telegram/exec approvals: reject `/approve` commands aimed at other bots, keep deterministic approval prompts visible 当 工具-result delivery fails, 和 停止 resolved exact IDs 从 matching other pending approvals 通过 prefix. (#37233) Thanks @huntharo.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/exec approvals: reject `/approve` commands aimed at other bots, keep deterministic approval prompts visible when tool-result delivery fails, and stop resolved exact IDs from matching other pending approvals by prefix. (#37233) Thanks @huntharo.

changes.title: Subagents/authority: persist leaf vs orchestrator control scope at spawn time 和 route 工具 plus slash-命令 control through shared ownership checks, so leaf sessions cannot regain orchestration privileges 之后 restore 或 flat-密钥 lookups. Thanks @tdjackey.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents/authority: persist leaf vs orchestrator control scope at spawn time and route tool plus slash-command control through shared ownership checks, so leaf sessions cannot regain orchestration privileges after restore or flat-key lookups. Thanks @tdjackey.

changes.title: ACP/ACPX 插件: bump the bundled `acpx` pin to `0.1.16` so 插件-local installs 和 strict version checks match the latest published CLI. (#41975) Thanks @dutifulbob.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/ACPX plugin: bump the bundled `acpx` pin to `0.1.16` so plugin-local installs and strict version checks match the latest published CLI. (#41975) Thanks @dutifulbob.

changes.title: ACP/sessions.patch: 允许 `spawnedBy` 和 `spawnDepth` lineage fields 在 ACP session keys so `sessions_spawn` 使用 `runtime: "acp"` no longer fails 期间 child-session setup. 修复 #40971. (#40995) thanks @xaeon2026.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/sessions.patch: allow `spawnedBy` and `spawnDepth` lineage fields on ACP session keys so `sessions_spawn` with `runtime: "acp"` no longer fails during child-session setup. Fixes #40971. (#40995) thanks @xaeon2026.

changes.title: ACP/停止 reason mapping: 解决 网关 chat `state: "错误"` completions as ACP `end_turn` 而不是 `refusal` so transient backend failures are not surfaced as deliberate refusals. (#41187) thanks @pejmanjohn.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/stop reason mapping: resolve gateway chat `state: "error"` completions as ACP `end_turn` instead of `refusal` so transient backend failures are not surfaced as deliberate refusals. (#41187) thanks @pejmanjohn.

changes.title: ACP/setSessionMode: propagate 网关 `sessions.patch` failures back to ACP clients so rejected mode changes no longer return silent success. (#41185) thanks @pejmanjohn.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/setSessionMode: propagate gateway `sessions.patch` failures back to ACP clients so rejected mode changes no longer return silent success. (#41185) thanks @pejmanjohn.

changes.rawTitle: ACP/bridge mode: reject unsupported per-session MCP server setup and propagate rejected session-mode changes so IDE clients see explicit bridge limitations instead of silent success. (#41424) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: ACP/session UX: replay stored user 和 assistant text 在 `loadSession`, expose 网关-backed session controls 和 metadata, 和 emit approximate session usage updates so IDE clients restore context more faithfully. (#41425) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/session UX: replay stored user and assistant text on `loadSession`, expose Gateway-backed session controls and metadata, and emit approximate session usage updates so IDE clients restore context more faithfully. (#41425) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: ACP/工具 streaming: enrich `tool_call` 和 `tool_call_update` events 使用 best-effort text content 和 file-location hints so IDE clients can follow bridge 工具 activity more naturally. (#41442) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/tool streaming: enrich `tool_call` and `tool_call_update` events with best-effort text content and file-location hints so IDE clients can follow bridge tool activity more naturally. (#41442) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.rawTitle: ACP/runtime attachments: forward normalized inbound image attachments into ACP runtime turns so ACPX sessions can preserve image prompt content on the runtime path. (#41427) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: ACP/regressions: 添加 网关 RPC coverage 为了 ACP lineage patching, ACPX runtime coverage 为了 image prompt serialization, 和 an operator smoke-test procedure 为了 live ACP spawn verification. (#41456) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/regressions: add gateway RPC coverage for ACP lineage patching, ACPX runtime coverage for image prompt serialization, and an operator smoke-test procedure for live ACP spawn verification. (#41456) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: ACP/follow-up hardening: make session restore 和 prompt completion degrade gracefully 在 transcript/更新 failures, enforce bounded 工具-location traversal, 和 skip non-image ACPX turns the runtime cannot serialize. (#41464) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/follow-up hardening: make session restore and prompt completion degrade gracefully on transcript/update failures, enforce bounded tool-location traversal, and skip non-image ACPX turns the runtime cannot serialize. (#41464) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.rawTitle: ACP/sessions_spawn: implicitly stream `mode="run"` ACP spawns to parent only for eligible subagent orchestrator sessions (heartbeat `target: "last"` with a usable session-local route), restoring parent progress relays without thread binding. (#42404) Thanks @davidguttman.

changes.rawTitle: ACP/main session aliases: canonicalize `main` before ACP session lookup so restarted ACP main sessions rehydrate instead of failing closed with `Session is not ACP-enabled: main`. (#43285, fixes #25692)

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/context-engine model auth: expose `runtime.modelAuth` and plugin-sdk auth helpers so plugins can resolve provider/model API keys through the normal auth pipeline. (#41090) thanks @xinhuagu.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/global hook runner: harden singleton state handling so shared global hook runner reuse does not leak or corrupt runner state across executions. (#40184) Thanks @vincentkoc.
